We need your help and support to ensure Senator Grassley's efforts are successful. Any donation you can provide will be greatly appreciated.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Last Friday’s deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here's the critical changes we secured.
| [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kMtugzAQRb8GdkF-BBsWLPJQqiyiqoukywjsAdwYg4xRRL--A0KVLMv3zOt6oKBCcrmnXJBYF3tW0lrFpmCEcUJpSgjJCU00vrimEhO1IFUa7Ql0pbFJ7QFCa9wLvEY9J6rv4rYQWZ1lmpYANUmJYELloKkSnKo6k7mKbdGGMIwRP0TsgmcENXlI3sZ50EsTZNXse6d7V1o9ouzt3A1GAWihcyUkqUBKVi31_DKF7qnKbihN4yJ-3uyziIkl0oE2U4d8Nb3BsZ-8AoSn6_O4MdW7AC4gFDmip7NGo3gJkXl_-Jp-VtgaNMTPTt6u3838GftCD29jrRmFxM0062aWRaAha-q5iCQOYGsZY-uf2RT4o7zfb37e_Xq--0gfrFmC7IR3mAf4z9yaJJt3FsnzH2BUhx4)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: _
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kM1uhCAUhZ9GdzVwcaAuXLRjZjKLSRfNTNPVBLmopIgGMRP79EVjmhDC-e7f4eqScsFEThknKZY5SNqo1JRAgBFKD4SQgtAM44shFTEROakPSU50L43NGq916Iz70R6jXjI19GlXUspBAc_z4lXnqiYSeY6yhoJSaArA1JZdCOOUsLcETvFMWs1eZ0_jvMa1SWT14geHg5MWpygHu_SjUVojx0JxQWotBNRrPTvNoX8o2Y_StC5h1W4fEuBrpNdo5j7yzfQOp2H2Skd4vDzed6YGF7QLEfIiooezBqNooTp_VrcRvjfYmWiIVU5cL1_t8pH6EsensdZMXMTNtNtm1kVEQ9Y0S5mIOAC2MoDtzzAHdpe329UvL7-evZwPd2jXIBzjHZZR_2fuTbLdOySi-gOGo4ZH)

---

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. _
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---

clean_body: Here’s the critical changes we secured. Here's the critical changes we secured. | Friend, The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time. Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups. In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions. That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people. Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan. Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense. Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill. Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies. Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending. Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority. Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward. After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power. The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington. In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO. It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members. If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending. Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills. Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing. The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed. These rules changes matter immensely, Friend. They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people. Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes. When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda. Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise. But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do. To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU. Thank you, Rep. Byron Donalds FL-19 Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress. 2430 Vanderbilt Beach Road, Ste 108 PMB 260, Naples, FL 34108

clean_body: We need to make sure that Democratic candidates have the resources they need to compete everywhere. | | Derek, I'll be straight with you: A strong DNC is critical to building the nationwide party infrastructure we need to elect more Democrats and keep making meaningful progress for the American people. So, I have to ask: Will you renew your DNC membership with a gift of $10 today? When you pitch in, you’ll also reserve your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card to show just how committed you are to electing Democrats nationwide. We need to make sure that Democratic candidates have the resources they need to compete everywhere. Thankfully, the DNC is making historic investments to organize, protect voters, and strengthen our party infrastructure in all 50 states, the territories, and D.C. But they’re relying on the year-round support from this grassroots team, Derek. Thank you for all that you do, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. **Miriam Lira-Hickerson**
Miriam Lira-Hickerson is the Ombudsman of Consumer Affairs for Minorities at the Nevada Department of Business and Industry. She is responsible for implementing the Department's education and outreach activities within the State's minority communities. As the Ombudsman, Ms. Lira-Hickerson provides consumer education, helps resolve consumer issues involving fraud or deceptive trade practices, and assists with business outreach and development. She is also a senior certified mediator and has mediated numerous civil disputes; also, Hickerson has 15 years being a Producer and host of a weekly radio named " Consumer Protection." She was named the City of Las Vegas in April 2013 Citizen of the Month. Recently Ms.Hickerson was named by the National National organization (NAWBO) as an Iconic Distinction Woman in Corporate/Government Services 2022. Lira-Hickerson holds a bachelor's degree in Marketing and a master's degree in International Commerce from Instituto Politecnico Nacional in Mexico City. She graduated from the FBI Civil Academy and the Las Vegas Metro Police Department Hispanic Citizen Academy. She has been an FBI Ambassador since 2014.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Judson=20Sapp?=
subject: Our Florida
body:
Judson Sapp for State Representative | | | [ ](https://judsonsapp.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=786f9905f43902655e694a1cd&id=aaf276e4c9&e=dc147d445f)
---
| _**Husband. Father. ****Conservative Businessman.
Proud Floridian.**_
---
| | Friends,

We are so blessed to be living in the Free State of Florida under the leadership of Governor Ron DeSantis. I am a born and raised Floridian who loves seeing the prosperity our state has enjoyed under Republican leadership. Florida has low taxes, a low crime rate, a thriving economy, a world class college system, and a reverence for our military and first responders.

In order to protect our freedoms, we must keep electing conservative leaders to our statewide offices and state legislature. Our State Representative, Bobby Payne, is term-limited and thus can not run for re-election again. I consider Bobby a friend and have admired the good work he has done in Tallahassee.

I wanted to share with you that shortly after Governor DeSantis’ inauguration last week, I walked over to the Secretary of State’s office to deliver my paperwork to run for State Representative in Florida’s 20th District – encompassing all of Putnam County and parts of Clay, Marion, and St. Johns Counties.

I know and love this district. It is where I live and raise my family. It is where I help businesses large and small with their infrastructure needs as the CEO of WJ Sapp Railroad Contractor. I myself was raised in Clay County and spent weekends and summers at our home on the St. Johns River in Putnam County in the Ocala National Forrest.

I will be working hard to earn the votes of the voters in our district, so that I can support Governor DeSantis’ agenda to Keep Florida Free.

I pledge to:
• Keep Taxes Low
• Defend our Second Amendment Rights
• Protect the Right to Life
• Support School Choice
• Stand Up to Big Tech and “Woke” Corporations
• Fight for our Freedoms

I look forward to hearing from you and earning your support. I hope you’ll join me in my fight to preserve our Florida way of life.

**_Judson_**
Post Office Box 73
Green Cove Springs, FL 32043

Our State Representative, Bobby Payne, is term-limited and thus can not run for re-election again. I consider Bobby a friend and have admired the good work he has done in Tallahassee. I wanted to share with you that shortly after Governor DeSantis’ inauguration last week, I walked over to the Secretary of State’s office to deliver my paperwork to run for State Representative in Florida’s 20th District – encompassing all of Putnam County and parts of Clay, Marion, and St. Johns Counties. I know and love this district. It is where I live and raise my family. It is where I help businesses large and small with their infrastructure needs as the CEO of WJ Sapp Railroad Contractor. I myself was raised in Clay County and spent weekends and summers at our home on the St. Johns River in Putnam County in the Ocala National Forrest. I will be working hard to earn the votes of the voters in our district, so that I can support Governor DeSantis’ agenda to Keep Florida Free. I pledge to: • Keep Taxes Low • Defend our Second Amendment Rights • Protect the Right to Life • Support School Choice • Stand Up to Big Tech and “Woke” Corporations • Fight for our Freedoms I look forward to hearing from you and earning your support. I hope you’ll join me in my fight to preserve our Florida way of life. Judson Post Office Box 73 Green Cove Springs, FL 32043 | "DONATE" | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Judson Sapp for State Representative, All rights reserved.

| | NEGOP Unicameral Update"2ND HOUSE ALERT" SATURDAY, JANUARY 14, 2023
A busy week at the Unicameral! We have hit the 464 introduced bill mark (this does not include Constitutional amendments and resolutions).
The Republican Senators have built on a positive first week and have introduced several groundbreaking bills that support our platform, uphold our Constitution, and advance our legislative agenda. We are continuing to work towards a positive vision for the freedom of our citizens, the progress of our economy, the growth and preservation of our children, and the accountability and transparency of state government. The Democrats continue to introduce bills that primarily do three things. One, they spend money. Two, they usually have titles that are designed to be hard to argue against, but in reality, enact a progressive agenda that often has nothing to do with the title of their bill. Three, they grow the power, influence, and size of government. We believe the Democrat influence will be limited based on Committee structures and a Governor committed to fiscal responsibility. We will alert you when we need more grassroots pressure to stop a bill. However, at this time we need to continue to move forward with the Republican vision for Nebraska that is based on life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. A brief update on key topics:
Life: Senators joined together and presented two bills. One serves women in need of pregnancy services and the second bill protects babies from being aborted after a heartbeat is established (around 6 weeks). This is a big improvement after 2022 in which no legislation was pursued.
Second Amendment: Constitutional Carry was reintroduced and will be debated on January 26th. Come to the Capitol! Senator Halloran has submitted the Second Amendment Preservation Act. The NEGOP supports it based on our legislative plan and Constitutional rights.
Education: The party continues to focus on ending the reputation of falling student scores and being one of two states without school choice legislation. Turning the tide on parental rights, appropriate curriculum, and overall performance scores dominates the conversation with our state board, regents, and legislators. Key legislation on school choice was introduced by Senator Geist and Senator Erdman this week. Curriculum protection was introduced by Senator Sanders last week and Senator Murman introduced a strong bill to protect parental rights. It is important you call, show up, and support our Senators who are taking on the big-money educational lobbies that have a vested interest in preserving the status quo and dominant institutional systems.
Election Integrity: Voter ID will be the largest (but not only) issue addressed in 2023 with the passage of the Constitutional amendment. Senator Erdman introduced his version of Voter ID this week and we are anticipating a bill to be introduced by Senator Slama. In addition, Senator Halloran introduced a bill to ensure voting machines and their infrastructure (if they continue) are manufactured in the USA. Senator Holdcroft introduced legislation for more secure ballots to make it harder to cheat. We anticipate more bills to be unveiled in this area before the bill introduction deadline passes. Public Safety: The big expenditure in 2023 being discussed is the new High- Security Prison. Numerous laws have been proposed on criminal justice reform but numerous pieces of legislation have lacked bipartisan discussions. We expect these conversations to evolve as the session continues. Taxes: The Governor continues to push on a broader discussion on TEEOSA. The results of this discussion should produce a better property tax situation for Nebraska. Secondarily, several bills have been introduced by different Senators to change our income tax rates. There are a lot of new spending bills on the table with the surplus. We are confident many of these bills will not be passed by this Governor who is committed to fiscal conservatism and doing more with less. Minimal spending growth should enable more funds to be returned to the citizens...where the money belongs. The size of how much will be going back to the citizens is still being debated behind closed doors. Call your Senators and demand lower taxes and less spending today! ESG: We have engaged other states and Nebraska Senators on this very important topic. Many “Red” states have experienced significant setbacks to their economy as radical leftists have forced high-level institutions to attack entities involved in fossil fuels, livestock, and more. In addition, new “woke” rules that affect multiple industries are being deployed to enact a new agenda in our economy. Treasurer Murante and our AG have spent a significant amount of time in this area. Senator Slama, Senator Jacobsen, Senator Hardin, and the NEGOP have engaged on this topic that will affect our power grid, the cattle industry, and our economy negatively as a whole. Stay tuned as this is a big area of concern for our state and the financial institutions they do business with who engage in these policies support an agenda against the interests of the State of Nebraska.
Broadband Expansion: One item the party took a formal position on in Hastings last August is Broadband expansion. We believe this is key for the growth of our economy. The Public Service Commission “PSC” is adopting measures in real-time to aid in this expansion. Furthermore, several broadband bills have been introduced that pertain to this topic. The party desires an efficient, cost-effective, and transparent view of those funds and projects. Stay tuned for the advancement of this topic.
Transparency: Citizens did not waste their first opportunity to express how they feel at a Rules committee hearing. Conservatives showed up in overwhelming numbers to voice their support to follow the Constitution and end secret voting. In addition, numerous statements on the record were made to object to Democrat-led efforts to end the free exercise of prayer to begin Unicameral Sessions as well as to reduce the second amendment rights of citizens at the Capitol. Rules are not legislation but DO direct the legislature on how they conduct business. Senator Conrad noted the “Unprecedented Attendance” for the hearing. The people made a difference on those issues by showing up. “Some” (Not All) Key Bills Central Committee Members and Executive Teams are monitoring: These bills, constitutional amendments, and resolutions related to Constitutional adherence, platform values, or legislative agenda items adopted by the Central Committee or discussed by Legislative Subcommittees made up of Central Committee or Delegate members. [LB15](https://www.ne.gop/so/b4OMoj14F/c?w=rYzoEyckZK1rxdegQC5q_NyN6XZzghyeIZw6ILpqPZM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk4ODUiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)[Briese](https://www.ne.gop/so/b4OMoj14F/c?w=jbsyXOlbsyV6fcyFgn4UhmgI0SsXGSC1ZzHtBt2LRsw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy9zZWFyY2hfYnlfaW50cm9kdWNlci5waHA_SW50cm9kdWNlcj0xNTYmU2Vzc2lvbkRheT0yMDIzIiwiciI6IjY5YzViNzZhLTg0OTItNDI1Yy05Njk1LTEyZWU5ZGRhNWQzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9)Change clean_body: For Your Situational Awareness | NEGOP Unicameral Update "2ND HOUSE ALERT" SATURDAY, JANUARY 14, 2023 A busy week at the Unicamera | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT"January 14, 2023 | | | | For Your Situational Awareness | | | | | NEGOP Unicameral Update"2ND HOUSE ALERT" SATURDAY, JANUARY 14, 2023 A busy week at the Unicameral! We have hit the 464 introduced bill mark (this does not include Constitutional amendments and resolutions). The Republican Senators have built on a positive first week and have introduced several groundbreaking bills that support our platform, uphold our Constitution, and advance our legislative agenda. We are continuing to work towards a positive vision for the freedom of our citizens, the progress of our economy, the growth and preservation of our children, and the accountability and transparency of state government. The Democrats continue to introduce bills that primarily do three things. One, they spend money. Two, they usually have titles that are designed to be hard to argue against, but in reality, enact a progressive agenda that often has nothing to do with the title of their bill. Three, they grow the power, influence, and size of government. We believe the Democrat influence will be limited based on Committee structures and a Governor committed to fiscal responsibility. We will alert you when we need more grassroots pressure to stop a bill. However, at this time we need to continue to move forward with the Republican vision for Nebraska that is based on life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. A brief update on key topics: Life: Senators joined together and presented two bills. One serves women in need of pregnancy services and the second bill protects babies from being aborted after a heartbeat is established (around 6 weeks). This is a big improvement after 2022 in which no legislation was pursued. Second Amendment: Constitutional Carry was reintroduced and will be debated on January 26th. Come to the Capitol! Senator Halloran has submitted the Second Amendment Preservation Act. The NEGOP supports it based on our legislative plan and Constitutional rights. Education: The party continues to focus on ending the reputation of falling student scores and being one of two states without school choice legislation. Turning the tide on parental rights, appropriate curriculum, and overall performance scores dominates the conversation with our state board, regents, and legislators. Key legislation on school choice was introduced by Senator Geist and Senator Erdman this week. Curriculum protection was introduced by Senator Sanders last week and Senator Murman introduced a strong bill to protect parental rights. It is important you call, show up, and support our Senators who are taking on the big-money educational lobbies that have a vested interest in preserving the status quo and dominant institutional systems. Election Integrity: Voter ID will be the largest (but not only) issue addressed in 2023 with the passage of the Constitutional amendment. Senator Erdman introduced his version of Voter ID this week and we are anticipating a bill to be introduced by Senator Slama. In addition, Senator Halloran introduced a bill to ensure voting machines and their infrastructure (if they continue) are manufactured in the USA. Senator Holdcroft introduced legislation for more secure ballots to make it harder to cheat. We anticipate more bills to be unveiled in this area before the bill introduction deadline passes. Public Safety: The big expenditure in 2023 being discussed is the new High- Security Prison. Numerous laws have been proposed on criminal justice reform but numerous pieces of legislation have lacked bipartisan discussions. We expect these conversations to evolve as the session continues. Taxes: The Governor continues to push on a broader discussion on TEEOSA. The results of this discussion should produce a better property tax situation for Nebraska. Secondarily, several bills have been introduced by different Senators to change our income tax rates. There are a lot of new spending bills on the table with the surplus. We are confident many of these bills will not be passed by this Governor who is committed to fiscal conservatism and doing more with less. Minimal spending growth should enable more funds to be returned to the citizens...where the money belongs. The size of how much will be going back to the citizens is still being debated behind closed doors. Call your Senators and demand lower taxes and less spending today! ESG: We have engaged other states and Nebraska Senators on this very important topic. Many “Red” states have experienced significant setbacks to their economy as radical leftists have forced high-level institutions to attack entities involved in fossil fuels, livestock, and more. In addition, new “woke” rules that affect multiple industries are being deployed to enact a new agenda in our economy. Treasurer Murante and our AG have spent a significant amount of time in this area. Senator Slama, Senator Jacobsen, Senator Hardin, and the NEGOP have engaged on this topic that will affect our power grid, the cattle industry, and our economy negatively as a whole. Stay tuned as this is a big area of concern for our state and the financial institutions they do business with who engage in these policies support an agenda against the interests of the State of Nebraska. Broadband Expansion: One item the party took a formal position on in Hastings last August is Broadband expansion. We believe this is key for the growth of our economy. The Public Service Commission “PSC” is adopting measures in real-time to aid in this expansion. Furthermore, several broadband bills have been introduced that pertain to this topic. The party desires an efficient, cost-effective, and transparent view of those funds and projects. Stay tuned for the advancement of this topic. Transparency: Citizens did not waste their first opportunity to express how they feel at a Rules committee hearing. Conservatives showed up in overwhelming numbers to voice their support to follow the Constitution and end secret voting. In addition, numerous statements on the record were made to object to Democrat-led efforts to end the free exercise of prayer to begin Unicameral Sessions as well as to reduce the second amendment rights of citizens at the Capitol. Rules are not legislation but DO direct the legislature on how they conduct business. Senator Conrad noted the “Unprecedented Attendance” for the hearing. The people made a difference on those issues by showing up. “Some” (Not All) Key Bills Central Committee Members and Executive Teams are monitoring: These bills, constitutional amendments, and resolutions related to Constitutional adherence, platform values, or legislative agenda items adopted by the Central Committee or discussed by Legislative Subcommittees made up of Central Committee or Delegate members. provisions of the Wage and Hour Act provisions relating to decisions on appeals under the Tax Equalization and Review Commission Act provisions relating to the assessment of real property that suffers significant property damage state agencies from imposing annual filing and reporting requirements on charitable organizations provisions relating to child abuse and neglect under the Child Protection and Family Safety Act and the Nebraska Juvenile Code hearing officers and judges to interpret statutes and regulations to limit agency power and maximize individual liberty leasing of dark fiber and eliminate certain powers of the Public Service Commission provisions relating to parental involvement in and access to learning materials in schools for carrying of concealed handguns without a permit, change provisions relating to concealed weapons, and prohibit certain regulation of weapons by cities, villages, and counties motorcycle, moped, and autocycle helmet and eye protection provisions for a penalty enhancement for a controlled substances violation resulting in serious bodily injury or death the My Student, My Choice Act display of the national motto in schools the definition of household income for homestead exemptions requirements for voting systems under the Election Act the Second Amendment Preservation Act amendments to change from a unicameral legislature to a bicameral legislature, provide for election of members of the Legislature on a partisan ballot, require election of legislative officers and committee chairpersons by a public vote, and require all meetings of the Legislature to be open to the public amendment to prohibit governmental entities from imposing any taxes other than retail consumption taxes and excise taxes amendment to require the state to impose a consumption tax or an excise tax on all new goods and services and to provide a tax exemption for grocery items (Please Note: A few Central Committee members have Please contact your Central Committee Member to express how you would like them to vote next Saturday on supporting/opposing this Tax Plan as a Party) provisions relating to the taxation of name: Special Elections Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Urgent special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire
body:
With the future of reproductive health care, climate change, voting rights, and much more at risk we can’t afford to not fight for every seat | | |
---
| | **FIRST:** Grassroots donors helped state Democrats bring home historic victories during the 2022 midterms – flipping chambers in Minnesota, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. **THEN:** State Democrats won the first competitive special election of 2023, flipping a seat in Virginia’s Senate by just 348 votes! **NOW: We are facing even more important special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire – where special elections could determine chamber control over the course of 2023.** This is a rare and urgent opportunity to fight for control of these chambers in an odd-numbered year – so we’re doing everything we can to fight for every last seat. But we can’t win elections without your help, which is why we’re asking: [Can you rush a donation today? name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Hold this seat
body:
Peter, As a former NYPD Detective, I know the work they take on and what they leave behind to do that job. So every day I will stand for Law Enforcement.
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-r/) Friends, As a former NYPD Detective, I know the work they take on and what they leave behind to do that job. So every day I will stand for Law Enforcement. The other day, I joined leaders of the House Republican Conference as we pledged to protect and serve law enforcement. **From safeguarding the streets as an NYPD Detective to serving NY-04 in Congress, I will always stand with my brothers and sisters in blue.** [HELP ME HOLD THIS SEAT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-y/) You've shown me your support to get me across the line, and I made promises I intend to keep. **This seat is the #1 targeted seat in New York State.** The Biden Administration will stop at nothing to target me using ads. I'll work harder and hold my counterparts on both sides of the aisle accountable. [**What I ask from you is your recurring financial support. Consider donating what you'd spend on several cups of coffee each month. We will use that for a well-thought-out plan to hold this seat.**](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-j/) [DONATE $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-i/) [DONATE $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-d/) [DONATE $100 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-h/) [DONATE $250 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-k/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-u/) As your Congressman,
-> **I will STAND for law enforcement.**
-> **I will HOLD THIS SEAT with your support.** Sincerely,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-nkrihjk-iubikjttk-o/)

body:
| **BREAKING: The GOP launches brutal attacks on the January 6th Committee after the Committee suggested criminals charges for Trump**

**[**We're sending a letter to the January 6th Committee thanking them for their brave work and we need your signature! We only have 460 more spots open for top Democrats to sign – sign right now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38392?t=6&akid=6025%2E878179%2EJ-tczQ)** | [DONATE $5 RIGHT NOW AND SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38392?t=7&akid=6025%2E878179%2EJ-tczQ)
---
**To: The January 6th Committee
From: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38392?t=8&akid=6025%2E878179%2EJ-tczQ)**

Dear January 6th Committee,

Exposing Donald Trump’s involvement in the January 6th attempted insurrection is saving our Democracy.

I know that persevering through brutal attacks from Trump’s MAGA stooges in Congress wasn’t easy.

But, spending countless hours combing over evidence to find the truth about that horrific day was crucial work.

Last week, you made me proud to be an American.

I’m so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

**The bravery you’ve shown in standing up for what’s right will go down in history.**

Despite the attacks you’ve endured and the censorship you’ve received, you’ve never wavered.

**So thank you. Our country is better because of your leadership.** [**Today, I’m signing this letter and making a donation to VPP to keep electing leaders like you all.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38392?t=9&akid=6025%2E878179%2EJ-tczQ) | [DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38392?t=10&akid=6025%2E878179%2EJ-tczQ)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed t

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh4i2v77fkddi64gmiaod4lq1kj36dmgqrrq90n0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfq2ipoq62un3dov7v1goh9kjlkpe6hjho44caao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob4c9h2bs)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcniupdgcdqkqtvpt3fiamjnmi2nk26qb755ucu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob4c9h2bs)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zungol2sju7l5f8j2j45fhm0a7vmobsp4h4hli8o).625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znfst4io6oh5vt08gu8s3mn0l9rdjth3trdqn8o0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cpjm1o31chh649fg)

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfsk9gl74k0vnkn40glg0ljr59knpu10085qebr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob0clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdar4667gbdmn879ndq7eanvbfbh263ga016hle0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob0clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3e9upi9pvsb2bfm585q709ommv7mprbpmrr3jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob0clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: I’m FIRING Omar, Swalwell, and Schiff
body:
Are you sick of Ilhan Omar, Eric Swalwell, Adam Schiff & their antics?

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4aevaidu90du9pbahi3rqsnsni5mtj7d7k0rns0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob0cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu5ul3ifs41gogeuiqr84ng7eatt2l9s9f9i33tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge0ob0cth2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| January 15th, 2023 | Issue XLVI
---
| |
---
---
| | |
---
Leader Rob Ortt and Senate Republicans Lay Out 'Rescue New York' Agenda for the 2023 Legislature
This week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and the Senate Republican Conference laid out their legislative agenda for 2023: Rescue New York. The Rescue New York Agenda focuses on public safety, affordability, strengthening our state, and freedom. These are the issues that New Yorkers care about, they are the issues that our Democratic colleagues have done nothing about, and in fact, have made worse.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gDHH8ZpZhvD6EC-qEIHVujrjd-owH5KaAxw5rg7JrFdbDseXu6CJ2pL1zDKooFH7ZEa3s8CgTtQgwy7Ezae2q33AC307zbNue3ZFz5ihANevYVUNTZU5Mvx93nNlTKqTYLszhbNsn6fYDm67_LS3TURn7ijrBh7uOl_X5pX3v852QwetO0bMnOTLymRyrnfVEysBa_tzen7wWwgeKGc839FZsEwfnugwzBl-DvwYF3I9HAEZkq8Ow==&c=iHCauI7oXFU4_8IIoU_IuB622Lbh3vWG2GwtXyIQBGQQCvCwChavkg==&ch=K6sHSVpVzFIRRfqbcN4s8D6jLrJeMwMA4__cf3QHDyRsqIF4duf30Q==)
---
| |
---
|
# Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Kathy Hochul's State of the State

---
Unfortunately, the Governor's speech included policies that will make life more difficult for struggling families and small businesses. Touting unachievable energy policies, new mandates on small business and state-driven housing policies will only drive up costs for overburdened New Yorkers, chasing out even more taxpayers and more jobs.
As we continue to examine the full details of her proposals, my Senate Republican colleagues and I are ready to take action on common-sense policies that make New York safer, stronger, more affordable and more free.
---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0457%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=RZECozCN581c7%2f9teqVTaw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656791%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=28FFfQqJ6rKA3QtIMZ32Qg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E2c3MkAFV2yoJ%2f3o6L9Rjw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E2c3MkAFV2yoJ%2f3o6L9Rjw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. name: American Action News
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9pm0iggvlqiccg1necd3h319sn8aa5pef1n2168_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36c5h2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0u8d2ong6sark28bs5f3smnf7kof1bdqll234oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36c5h2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zodpiia6tq85qo6l83rt7a2qi2fefovb3am8se20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36c5h2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoib7117996elbgqgkfcf6pkd1pb3t32p5jm0qj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4874q9gfgob9nrf4pkenq83c3m2mffitaq8gsi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2oiepc8ii730lkc2hkf1c288s39brjdjtf3295g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0vj0khd7strh06s4sb92kqbjemheujsk3btoch8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9rm57nikvbaat64170s3bm2dgu2al1b8bib4kg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o32cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5fuoeb5sktorjeeoh976d30ats8omrj9tfecnog_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o32cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7qv178q423cr9923i9c7epo9r273hu046tlvb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o32cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z56nuau4a4dfl090ijedp80kh2672qkaq1pddsgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctge2o36cph2bs). name: Elizabeth @ American Federation for Children
subject: a story about choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children |
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
Hi Peter, this is Elizabeth BeShears, and I help represent the American Federation for Children.
Our organization believes school choice should be available to ALL, regardless of skin color, background, or zip code, so students like **Walter Blanks** can attend a school that works for **_him_**.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
| | [**WATCH 'WALTER'S DREAM' NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
As a public school student, Walter felt like **_an exile in his own land_** , words he drew from the great Reverend Martin Luther King Jr's "I Have A Dream" speech. **[> > Listen to Walter discuss education freedom for ALL >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)** Peter, did you know _**72%**_**of Americans now support school choice** after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child? At the American Federation for Children, we're leading the movement to enact school choice programs in _every_ state. **We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. And 72% of Americans agree.**
---
[**I AGREE, I 'M IN THE 72%: CHIP IN >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
Peter, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight so students like Walter have a say in the education they deserve. **In just the past few years, we 've seen HUGE results.** After COVID, school choice is now supported by **72%** of Americans. Our organization has rallied grassroots choice activists across the country Over **700K** students are now in school choice programs nationwide Now, we're gearing up to take the next leap and deliver school choice wins in EVERY STATE in America. **That 's why we need your support -** school choice opponents are working overtime to undo the hard work we've already accomplished. **For students like Walter, we can 't afford to give up on this fight. **
We're asking you to join the fight for students, parents, and choice by making an [**initial donation**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r) today.**[Peter, are you a part of the 72% willing to fight for school choice?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203644:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)**
---
[**YES, I AM: CHIP IN $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203645:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
[**YES, I AM: CHIP IN $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203646:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
[**YES, I AM: CHIP IN $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203647:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)
---
[**YES, I AM: CHIP IN $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203648:JlFG0-G1N:m:1:3331421248:9A8B076FEB0C1BD0DC03D46D44B84BA6:r)

Peter, did you know 72%of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn't best for ANY individual child? At the American Federation for Children, we're leading the movement to enact school choice programs in every state. We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. And 72% of Americans agree. Peter, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight so students like Walter have a say in the education they deserve. In just the past few years, we 've seen HUGE results. After COVID, school choice is now supported by 72% of Americans. Our organization has rallied grassroots choice activists across the country Over 700K students are now in school choice programs nationwide Now, we're gearing up to take the next leap and deliver school choice wins in EVERY STATE in America. That 's why we need your support - school choice opponents are working overtime to undo the hard work we've already accomplished. For students like Walter, we can 't afford to give up on this fight. We're asking you to join the fight for students, parents, and choice by making an today. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Finally, George Santos is being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW) put investigators onto his tracks, but we figure that he’s not the only crook in Congress who needs scrutiny, and the need for their work is far from over.
body:
Ferreting out the crooks with CREW
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta14dc183-5859-47e7-8587-1ebfa03b3fbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, George Santos is now being investigated for crimes in the United States and Brazil. Investigators were put onto his tracks by Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington (CREW.) [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a510235-4517-43bf-b1df-f90f59931729/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In addition to the fact he's wanted in Brazil for using a stolen checkbook and fake name to commit bank fraud, **Congressmen Ritchie Torres and Dan Goldman hand delivered an ethics complaint to Santos' office that they filed with the Congressional Ethics Office because Santos' breaking campaign finance law numerous times.** He ignored legally required filings, even more important in his case as he was broke when he ran for office in 2020, but suddenly had millions--a big chunk of which he loaned his campaign--in 2022. We know that the Russian-American cousin of sanctioned Russian oligarch and friend of Putin Viktor Vekselberg funneled nearly $60,000 in total to various PACs, committees and the local Nassau County Republican Party (who just demanded he resign) for Santos' campaign. **But where did the rest of the money come from?** Was it illegally funneled through his business by the same Russians? Others? We don't know because Santos ignored the law and refused to tell us. What Torres and Goldman have done is important, but with Republicans in control jelly-spined Kevin McCarthy will do all he can to weaken this effort.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3cf15ba-1180-4bf8-9f75-d0978259613b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| This is why we need Citizens for Responsible Ethics in Washington (CREW) on this. They are the kind of bulldogs who get results, going after names in the past you'll know such as Tom DeLay, Jack Abramoff and you can almost pick any name from the thoroughly corrupt Trump Administration. [**Would you join us in giving CREW $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today, so we can be sure someone will get to the bottom of the criminality that seems to naturally emanate from George Santos?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9feaf6ed-3784-4aaa-bd8d-7664b7845777/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for protecting the integrity of our democracy. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T069621d4-785d-461b-a2bd-9a8c65e101fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z32odmq5grok0i7quc0c4hvs5cr1apa858k73j40_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z758ls4h1sug9d3e35178iovhq51s6o5calg120o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zou7h8f3g15ogefn0dcl5p75ksq710bnp18u5gro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free coll

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztk7oic7f679rl2dh9rg7n766m6b1jr7mr4bo0bo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsn9udjjcmejnvoc5kv52eekftalbvuci0t9i2mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6chh2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq5h1vekrv16adornhlv2tamu5ooiimk0ud8djo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6chh2bs)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9be8ajtqpm5eq195u9mmuphni2njt818kcm5urg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6chh2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgn08511jf88n4r07t8f96cvdmjus91emmr99qo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6chh2bs)

Connor Boyack

body:

| |
---

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8rugppbq24ag27aghin4g7pc8maelkfhl9nrq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl5hreg8559poc9csp79ii1kem1lvhe4ci8lv1qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq8ufselp3nt8fmtm1e00h69ceshmninqjf5ucn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
