name: Great America Update
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7534%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r%2fWtfB91yaSVn1FcBMQiVA&sysid=1)

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78692%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=irNuSqSkEz%2bPiJ8NIfI8bw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78693%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wKhXe3qs1vqQObf3VO5YYg&sysid=1)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78694%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qs8w72YtT29bOAy4ipsAFg&sysid=1)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | _107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7534%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r%2fWtfB91yaSVn1FcBMQiVA&sysid=1)_

---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7534%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r%2fWtfB91yaSVn1FcBMQiVA&sysid=1)

name: American Briefing
subject: Is your alma mater staying true to their original mission?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj12g31nfoeba2ofq6avaoveb2v30h5u4tdkh678_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cph2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc6a9cmmtcsp27kl5p63v2jk45i3q1c4e0m6jnn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cph2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpjkqqk4gupsrdbhqv4ct1g91d3qjgvfrrte2ai0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctgeeor6cph2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Redistricting Update [via AOTL]
subject: Here’s the good news:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This movement helped secure fairer maps.
|
---

We’re preparing for the challenges ahead, friend.

President Obama charged us with pressing forward in our fight for fair redistricting. We are more committed than ever to continue pushing back against map manipulators and empowering voters across the country to stay loud about the importance of the fair maps movement.

[**Here are some of the challenges we face in 2023:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57347956/387646500/-767066908?refcode=20230115_AOTL_F_eoy2resend_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3MzdkZGYwLWRjOTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1O3iEOMwp_avcNb4iHJudPv6H9E6L8p7nlkmdahfjaY=)
➡️ Republicans in states like Ohio making it harder to pass voter-led ballot initiatives
➡️ Multiple maps still in violation of the Voting Rights Act
➡️ Extremists advocating for their far-right, and far-fetched, ISL theory
**[CHIP IN $23 TODAY TO FIGHT FOR FAIR MAPS IN 2023>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57347957/387646501/-767066908?amount=23&refcode=20230115_AOTL_F_eoy2resend_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3MzdkZGYwLWRjOTQtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1O3iEOMwp_avcNb4iHJudPv6H9E6L8p7nlkmdahfjaY=)**
**Here’s the good news:** This movement helped secure fairer maps. States with fairer maps like Pennsylvania and Michigan saw higher voter turnout than last midterm election!

**The bad news:** In the wake of that success, we’re already seeing map manipulators finding new ways to disempower voters. If we take a break from reforming redistricting and protecting voting rights, we won’t be able to catch up.

clean_body: This movement helped secure fairer maps. | We’re preparing for the challenges ahead, friend. President Obama charged us with pressing forward in our fight for fair redistricting. We are more committed than ever to continue pushing back against map manipulators and empowering voters across the country to stay loud about the importance of the fair maps movement. = ➡️ Republicans in states like Ohio making it harder to pass voter-led ballot initiatives ➡️ Multiple maps still in violation of the Voting Rights Act ➡️ Extremists advocating for their far-right, and far-fetched, ISL theory = Here’s the good news: This movement helped secure fairer maps. States with fairer maps like Pennsylvania and Michigan saw higher voter turnout than last midterm election! The bad news: In the wake of that success, we’re already seeing map manipulators finding new ways to disempower voters. If we take a break from reforming redistricting and protecting voting rights, we won’t be able to catch up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for your support, All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Last Friday’s deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here's the critical changes we secured.
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zajnqpl7mgl81946u9lut04089ld8oj6jcsgtnf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn't work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn't in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That 's why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people's House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following: _
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztallgelfns5nnsf4udv93t3o19balrs5q6aqjoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zumr209chcmshv0ng2fgd1l6d151ukp9o1u35m9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6jd9o7k5vj9jnglvmojp0r76n47682h2nq0s6e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2pe79pbgjgk7d2317svumkhvccqr1ubnretgitg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zagssfo2tidc9dp0mmqmslh0l2jilp8paj2sifq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z12d50i1v1qc70moad0cdmv590uvev27cueheiio_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z925437o23bf1hhqkk789f11n74ub4unvl0h46h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrne3hnb0nv5kv1i14hqlun19gff57v6sgk621n8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI's illegal and partisan raid on President Trump's home last summer, we've got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn't be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn 't be afraid of that. _
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they're forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we're depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znh6561s949tseoq5mf2eik0b7u7op9npt7h75t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3a63e0lj2k0lphgjiia6un6dolks0bv3ep5n5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c1h2bs)
---
Rep. Byron Donalds
FL-19
---
---
Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress.
---

Naples, FL 34108

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztblmcul6ju8jq7vvk95k9vd20enhlajbp0aa5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za409tthjmmucmv3vvtehi9gakk4qbfk2vh158jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv2b11q17bpm0pb53rijk7gp8ddjikkhugkof9p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg1p8aurlk7qr52mheusu3a6fh3u04ipgk8so1io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqr5co1a7e27uhqi4cvjo4svcm46cl2hfnqnv7hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zldoakv8vbo7ql35vohe230b2poah7u0e50u58sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo38btav92sglhlb3m0lgiproit74j5c8ff117gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrg5q3vjsigk867rtt10r2plfjipiib4qobeqtv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgcikej59vlnpra3286gp2o6lg7cpvjr1q6mmg20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1a3arg96qduicmj658il34g1tn6ksao8aair2g8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9kafaab6gd1tthbe4akarc9cjaic01k5k417690_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc82p9bht1emvd0cedafj85gjm9chce0ds1miab0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4clh2bs).

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z75esqg4jo9dpg7ltsdrb0pkvovj7qg72rdfqoho).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. Look, this food tastes homemade. It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just . When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. As it stands today, it's every man for himself. In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters More Raving Reviews From Customers! | | Rory H. I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things. ---|--- | Billy H. Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup. ---|--- | Kevin S. The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start. ---|--- | Carol B. I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings. ---|--- | Ken K. I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal. ---|--- | Justin A. My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great. ---|--- | Gary M. I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed. ---|--- | John H. We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when." ---|--- Real reviews from real customers. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdtjk94o8i1f19l8dpek5iq838r4tf82tmu0urg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zunnmvbshjl27n55avjf6302ih9obtapr3pp7j30_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqgdrj0ltsuor3scpt5v44h6fsdcrmbshcp84k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zloib40vdre55q1c5pg7873frapijjnj3oa2dbn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zktqvdv1k1gs0hdcbgbjpbo152qa352f908rkt58_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfp9h6ohej3kufv2e7gf9dp0tjgae8usm1j43p2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4eh4mtamaofe4pdoefqfbq3g5puh30lkq9p4f9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0cfisl9o1i3r7k5q45niafhc20s36c3l5sn0plo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znuav9vufe6ref3og9t0um0j5q23mk9i4kprkqe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt25cnrqhs4aq813ka8i9i0mifqcdk0m6cvjfgoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Hear me out. I wouldn’t give a gun to my daughter. I’m a little more traditional about protecting my family. But in this world, it’s just plain STUPID to not have some form of defense on yuo at all times. I needed to give my little girl something that would make her, and make me, _feel safe_. Enter:[ THE REBEL BATON](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11261/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/202ccefc49f55126303abc7371b37f3c9627f087) This masterpiece of a tool combines two of the most practical and most-used defense mechanisms ever used in a violent situation. You see, You need light. Then you need something able to bash things with. This weapon combines those two elements into [one extremely portable gadget.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11261/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/202ccefc49f55126303abc7371b37f3c9627f087) My daughter keeps it in her bag at all times. The confidence she has knowing she will always have an item that will keep her safe is invaluable. The peace of mind I have with my family and especially, my daughter, is second to none. This is legal (for now). [Get it before something happens.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11261/6374453/44218251c56d498b95834308443d039200a322cb/202ccefc49f55126303abc7371b37f3c9627f087)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childr
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuc9e9g0f2i8fhtjqqsnjre6fnaohasc7h463r5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zas91ei51o0dj4vffbp0okc7aph8skcrcgo1qcf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1tiq0e6uqic6rtmpqokdjvgd3ceotgp7hq6vek8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zelq1c8s18ovbme3989qv834pakdqu8osknmdu98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z10klu2nmu9o443v11cu6bvi9fpg9mi0skkth7m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfvtl18jhpt9ohacrblgsn1e73ek1u6q52crg3ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie8oj4cdh2bs)

name: Your America
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and governmentincluding an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7748%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=dWjJPLaKq95yRrEoROFnoQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92680%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T4fvATIy2giQzK8BFUf0UQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92681%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r5XPCpSuOpnoO6uDlTbBoA&sysid=1) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c92682%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9JmC24ZBJO4h4AYNP0ANxQ&sysid=1) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkon17l94fss8q4bfngj981t36ckca4o0f3ei1ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs)
|
---

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1mp9em49lcd58j1bmbplamvq5ovtsevmdrid58_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrm51oevtv5oae430f29sguf2cec502vqf9n32j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcv9fajqjae1svc2o4g625gn48mpq66qd9998b98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zou4d500m4q77kadenu9igq6aukv2v8fchgj6r7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp68rddvopcf56g84052bs27d9mgfu8255bbs6qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie2o74c3h2bs)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo013iid74645553a7asrs73uatimmafu3mnfir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie6or4cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv1nsc2j6p7cov6oeb1q73l8oiehlb5gkutl37qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie6or4cdh2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu75u5a43n90q66jqdmn3jftglte8r2vlm0l60o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6ctie6or4cdh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FwXKPmXy5qiBfJe4ev2pdQ&sysid=1). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656702%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KShd%2fa9LNO%2bKvhL6ua1gkg&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PTRY832pszebEO92n9ISw&sysid=1) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656704%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gvMJIGJpwLoSu5SXOh7Lzg&sysid=1) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656715%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D1ujVZW3IyjDagvp0NoMmQ&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656716%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k2qjK53Sgun6XOF%2blqNNbw&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PTRY832pszebEO92n9ISw&sysid=1) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4PTRY832pszebEO92n9ISw&sysid=1)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c656717%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jNB4w2QU4DhEbDraeG2byg&sysid=1).

| | | After repeatedly violating Facebook's own rules, and using his account to incite violence and insurrection, Donald Trump was banned for two years in 2021. **But that two years has just ended** , and Facebook says it will announce "in coming weeks" whether Trump will be reinstated. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook "Don't end Trump's ban."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc58e8a00-55df-4867-a5e7-575c292ee663/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _(Already took this action? Forward it to friends! Want to unsubscribe? Click the link below)_ Trump is an ongoing threat to our democracy, and Facebook should not give him a megaphone to spew his hatred and violent threats. Facebook has the right — and the responsibility — to keep the ban, and as a matter of public safety, it needs to do so. [**Add your name, and tell Facebook "Don't end Trump's ban."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83b47816-91db-4e83-a2c5-5e634cdc4cdc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementa

| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=683b95a88f2842be8d659f5d467f8099&_e=H59oiWmuJe7JVJ02uc36VGyq2rZxS3W0IIGs_ENkO1LGC3QqgpuvcztR3yGEhU5qhU7CA9OrZBdjK6-eNLPrvZ4Ym-fNyw-0b7x0trtN4YMqgbAUTQiS3SJc0Jv8DOKBKke8oxBsM-sXHRTYgKd4Qh8uoA29oSG8c7U46QEZQ9niKO1f2tonMrVjsQJ24lMYcJDVM3t8xCO4S_rllCZCR6WKmuI3f7KwZ1mkknSGdi1CxKZH0x-04zPLtcBZ7LozQtPz-K3KmN2sxIP2fNw9WmoME7jFGWQfQezNkvpErD9YwLlfBJLVs1EI_5_jprCpDC8OYYsZD-4FdqxAjqo0FW61WjRDI7c7oUACifpDn9zrkqqfqlec9nwWv9MJMsE9zrTnc2yZ0-9ZhVHNyP7KLQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, “**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**.”

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=683b95a88f2842be8d659f5d467f8099&_e=H59oiWmuJe7JVJ02uc36VGyq2rZxS3W0IIGs_ENkO1LGC3QqgpuvcztR3yGEhU5qhU7CA9OrZBdjK6-eNLPrvZ4Ym-fNyw-0b7x0trtN4YMqgbAUTQiS3SJc0Jv8DOKBKke8oxBsM-sXHRTYgKd4Qh8uoA29oSG8c7U46QEZQ9niKO1f2tonMrVjsQJ24lMYcJDVM3t8xCO4S_rllCZCR6WKmuI3f7KwZ1mkknSGdi1CxKZH0x-04zPLtcBZ7LozXowP5zK5guSi_Ix1hTaEe4DUzvWgfT_sFIUdqKDR5k_mEc-q68cGpf33dE0Ng5zdwjoL1wEiifYStvPPwaDozrzg_yBSjBa26cnFSo7b8g3HEyZ6wDll2Trulr2FluhJ-zzCHNa9GQakKP3RuuT83g%3D%3D)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
