name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ae6e3822354266973abc4867efc96c&_e=I2CZJfxaTRkcxW8RB0e3r4gOCqJ91jnOaaeXkMQZUegLmoFoutmimwXfratdFinTl6zPTK5cWFHnOzqJlNlTGKKihWYlLH35lV7eKoLPdOu9uCe_fnxHrE9AFSlzrE6EmAfNmFzrxrI1dmIBR26ullShDnXPSJE3MrVu0BpXvCxfF6yne3QLW7s_QY0wkpBzSUc_hqGp6SL3T8mokBHotAHB1bJkyfkNDHfh3eBaMvdqc2B5PfALceqOamP805ie2TPIzwu46otQpDLzWAVtZjqf6cyhZKl5LG3MbNRvEW9Gqom9nszTRaVmo0X-ufdA7RzLq9-d98qAAgmKjdkMwthVpcOPJxSj8TPlXRxPNKhiiRZpikeq_ZAdYZavK81XroyIu1QrzBckxX9NudU6kw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ae6e3822354266973abc4867efc96c&_e=I2CZJfxaTRkcxW8RB0e3r4gOCqJ91jnOaaeXkMQZUegLmoFoutmimwXfratdFinTl6zPTK5cWFHnOzqJlNlTGKKihWYlLH35lV7eKoLPdOu9uCe_fnxHrE9AFSlzrE6EmAfNmFzrxrI1dmIBR26ullShDnXPSJE3MrVu0BpXvCxfF6yne3QLW7s_QY0wkpBzSUc_hqGp6SL3T8mokBHotAHB1bJkyfkNDHfh3eBaMvdqc2B5PfALceqOamP805ie3tn6tJVQR7eQ_pxVnLQnZBADkodT4uXJonQI0O9qtrYgi8c26-QEb7GWrRMjfdeP0Qfz7mnG6vgHCzIlYPCn1AiP3CdMgXV8avqOjR0q85qP8MuY6nq_ItHnhS6hwUOWMVgL04oeWcTFZJVbRAkWGQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ae6e3822354266973abc4867efc96c&_e=I2CZJfxaTRkcxW8RB0e3r4gOCqJ91jnOaaeXkMQZUegLmoFoutmimwXfratdFinTl6zPTK5cWFHnOzqJlNlTGKKihWYlLH35lV7eKoLPdOu9uCe_fnxHrE9AFSlzrE6EmAfNmFzrxrI1dmIBR26ullShDnXPSJE3MrVu0BpXvCxfF6yne3QLW7s_QY0wkpBzSUc_hqGp6SL3T8mokBHotAHB1bJkyfkNDHfh3eBaMvdqc2B5PfALceqOamP805ie1kQaG6XG0Wps5IsJY8UnkRhs4m8fyiRG5bFFZFMOhnZVCN-NkMbv6kwT5QfvJQusIpb7WYOJmK0Z5tiqS7-Q36miTM_yGUHHecJoOO6JO6vHq316Dkso1DI6NYsQHh10R7bWloIuujulbllM3LXQlg%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86ae6764ef524c178b98ccfd378dc912&_e=qElwamq4dI-RL7iLoCjTf6G1WcuSBpYy3DmWSBirhiuPGbA43CCwDTjt5iDRcL1-PO_A9VRP0vzu3FrSG3RnOkLFbVF5cof2zYFpBVYTDOIRXI5ce39T8rJ437ij44w_IbwFvcAcdZRkgss93JgmuChk7carFt0x0bjWCFb5voEZyg7r8MA_jFJiCdpEjYb1YaY1kuiryGIqJVYXVsvS_LM0yIN9_Sdx1klniY6-xiKBcZMdHuBwNDlqdzd2ADmUHcpbolFos55GVcbW_1NwQBZ8lc-Zkgv4SfFv2ILtgMrPFyQPH7oJpxSSPQJl13BObJ_33YozUVGhgzs2rbkBw8LjETJ29uRRpQDTV88DpJ82upSbq9bExL0Rmkb9q1A7fL409XnTydToS6xffJzgWg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86ae6764ef524c178b98ccfd378dc912&_e=qElwamq4dI-RL7iLoCjTf6G1WcuSBpYy3DmWSBirhiuPGbA43CCwDTjt5iDRcL1-PO_A9VRP0vzu3FrSG3RnOkLFbVF5cof2zYFpBVYTDOIRXI5ce39T8rJ437ij44w_IbwFvcAcdZRkgss93JgmuChk7carFt0x0bjWCFb5voEZyg7r8MA_jFJiCdpEjYb1YaY1kuiryGIqJVYXVsvS_LM0yIN9_Sdx1klniY6-xiKesQvT9Q91vwSkRdwhkcrW6w57W-49ysZeU5QtJk-6efA7WiEWdsan_w6j53tjNVca9bdKRWb8eF_8l1Cny2-je2jM00C3VUAfJ8PzCrqrPa0n5nLm7s7WJuDYJbvyRDExWpQ83CFa4UWsXj_N3yjfW_H8QhpGYI7PWz1aCw4KzA%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86ae6764ef524c178b98ccfd378dc912&_e=qElwamq4dI-RL7iLoCjTf6G1WcuSBpYy3DmWSBirhiuPGbA43CCwDTjt5iDRcL1-PO_A9VRP0vzu3FrSG3RnOkLFbVF5cof2zYFpBVYTDOIRXI5ce39T8rJ437ij44w_IbwFvcAcdZRkgss93JgmuChk7carFt0x0bjWCFb5voEZyg7r8MA_jFJiCdpEjYb1YaY1kuiryGIqJVYXVsvS_LM0yIN9_Sdx1klniY6-xiJ1FrIoBKxz4sbF_8mOOGdQpiA4vu0V2luW8aUGun9c9ZnwHtjtTJseI4nk00y7k2bxMg5t-tLja2KHNPgQvh0HfNSzetr7m0EYo3QkfNv0UuT0ADq3UUhR9Re6eGlyCBgAmqb7Mhj3Hnm_dGiDCdTL2gIebE_yRuSqqyKFw8Il6w%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

---

| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, “**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**.”

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://trk.libertyledger.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDE1LTBhMDRlYmU5MjUzNjQyY2RhZDhkMWZmMTJhNjM5ODAzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYW1lcmljYW4tbGVmdC1wcmVyZWdpc3Rlci8_c2M9MDA0OTdOMDI0MkwyMURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFtZXJpY2FubGVmdCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MV9BRV9MTE8zNDM5NSJ9/kb3EsQUXlAt5IPwrB04T0w)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

body:
| Peter, I don’t like to send an email like this on a Sunday, but Kate (my finance director) just asked me to reach out. By midnight tonight, we need to reach our first fundraising goal of 2023 — and we’re almost there! _Just 41 more donations of at least $15 would get us to our target._ I’m asking personally if you could make your first contribution to our team before time runs out. Here’s a link to give: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_email?amount=15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57357622/387682480/435245919?amount=15&refcode=ea.1fea15e6-f194-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ms=ea.1fea15e6-f194-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmVhMTVlNi1mMTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VsYXnD_VGLDoB-9gw96i0goR2XGJjlietlJFxhVlGRY=)** Your support is critical to my work for North Carolina. And I know there is more work to do. We need to keep up the fight to expand healthcare access, secure reproductive rights, and defend our democracy in the face of far-right attacks. Peter, I need you with me. Please, donate anything you can before midnight to help me start this year strong. Here’s that link again: = I truly appreciate your help, Roy | Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I'm drawing a line in the sand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

All hell is breaking loose, and _I'm drawing a line in the sand_.

Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the goon squad on the January 6 Committee voted to refer Donald Trump for criminal prosecution.

Now the Biden regime possesses the ammunition it needs to indict Donald Trump and block him from running in 2024.

**This is an all-hands-on-deck emergency for the America First movement,[so please chip in to defend President Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61384772:WjjbIEDNJ:m:1:2365227053:1F99CEC4C841AF9BCE7D943A915ADED2:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61384772:WjjbIEDNJ:m:1:2365227053:1F99CEC4C841AF9BCE7D943A915ADED2:r) [** ❯❯ DEFEND TRUMP ❮❮ **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61384772:WjjbIEDNJ:m:1:2365227053:1F99CEC4C841AF9BCE7D943A915ADED2:r) I am making it clear right now that in the next Congress, I plan to lead the fight to put an end to t the swamp's vendetta against Trump and the MAGA movement.

_In the new Congress, the Republican majority MUST_ :
---
• DEFUND the witch hunt against President Trump• IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE Joe Biden• IMPEACH, CONVICT, and REMOVE corrupt Attorney General Merrick Garland.
**From the moment Donald Trump began running for president, the establishment schemed to stop him.**

The Clinton campaign, the FBI, and Barack Obama invented the Russian collusion hoax.

Then Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff the Ukraine hoax.

Elon Musk's release of the Twitter Files showed that the FBI rigged the 2020 election by pressuring Twitter to censor the Hunter Biden laptop story.

**None of those coup attempts were enough to derail Trump and America First conservatives.**

Donald Trump announcing his re-election campaign sent the regime into panic mode.

And now the January 6 Committee voting to refer Trump to Biden's Justice Department for prosecution is the regime playing their ace in the hole.

**[Now I must have your help to defend President Trump, so please chip in today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61384772:WjjbIEDNJ:m:1:2365227053:1F99CEC4C841AF9BCE7D943A915ADED2:r).** **[JOIN THE FIGHT TO DEFEND TRUMP

subject: The Weekly Freedom Blueprint
body:

Welcome to our weekly Freedom Blueprint! This is where the Freedom Team will keep you up to date with America’s Governor Ron DeSantis and his work as he continues to deliver for the people of Florida.

Keep reading to see how Governor DeSantis is fighting for Florida this week.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef28692da5d39166a7f9abe11cd1d03d8220dad1a419557cb1e2a7f4c94afed1b8e503c11e31cef38eaa66e6e1df7f345fd9f99ae8afe468bfb537

They are coming for your gas stoves... but don’t worry, Team DeSantis cooked up a response. Our exclusive “Don’t Tread on Florida” Apron is available on our storefront!

We ran out of our newest product less than 24 hours after launching... But they're OFFICIALLY back by popular demand!
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef28692da5d39166a7f9abe11cd1d03d8220dad1a419557cb1e2a7f4c94afed1b8e503c11e31cef38eaa66e6e1df7f345fd9f99ae8afe468bfb537
Get yours before they're gone again . ⬇️

“When we say Don’t Tread on Florida... we mean that, including on your gas stoves! You’re not going to take our gas stoves away from us!” — Governor Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef286927dba7e2593f706cc222b9d0a5d9f52b9cef2c1396c383c460fb522784805cf9deb4cee9bb30433b9972669ae6b1e04cfe2969e2b6252da8

Four years ago, at the start of his first term, Governor DeSantis pledged to secure $2.5 billion over four years for Everglades restoration and protection of our state’s precious resources.

This week, on the exact day pledge from four years ago, Governor DeSantis announced an additional commitment to continue this historic momentum and conserve Florida’s natural beauty for future generations. This secures an additional $3.5 billion toward Everglades restoration and water quality projects, which will bring his administration’s total investment to a record $6.8 billion — the highest level of funding in Florida’s history.Governor DeSantis is America’s Everglades Governor!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef286927dba7e2593f706cc222b9d0a5d9f52b9cef2c1396c383c460fb522784805cf9deb4cee9bb30433b9972669ae6b1e04cfe2969e2b6252da8

Florida’s First Lady Casey DeSantis announced on Friday that more than 1,000 new law enforcement officers have joined Florida’s force of brave first responders. With Governor DeSantis at the helm, Florida is, and will remain, a law-and-order state!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef28695fc302b02018ad2449a50731334402b462d071c6f04a8f8fd97e095d94d064fe163e7564791e12e23fbcc4a42d3e30fce10caf24ca1f949b

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef286927dba7e2593f706cc222b9d0a5d9f52b9cef2c1396c383c460fb522784805cf9deb4cee9bb30433b9972669ae6b1e04cfe2969e2b6252da8

On Thursday, Governor DeSantis unveiled a legislative proposal to reign in unchecked Pharmacy Benefit Managers (PBMs) and drive transparency among prescription drug prices influenced by Big Pharma.

This proposal is an important part of the Governor’s efforts to lower prescription drug prices, reaffirms the state’s commitment to empower Floridians to make informed health care decisions, and demonstrates yet again that Governor DeSantis is committed to delivering for Florida’s seniors, who stand to benefit greatly from lower prescription drug costs.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f16e18d91ef286927dba7e2593f706cc222b9d0a5d9f52b9cef2c1396c383c460fb522784805cf9deb4cee9bb30433b9972669ae6b1e04cfe2969e2b6252da8

name: C7 Tac
subject: I'm 1776% sure no one will be taking.
body:
This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again...
| |
---
| |
---
---
| | _January 15th, 2023
_
---
|
---
| | It was 1776 when America gave Great Britain the finger and said “we’re out.”
For two-and-and-half centuries we Americans have enjoyed unadulterated, in-your-face freedom. (Despite the left wing’s best efforts.)

And I think we can both agree that one thing has provided us with this freedom that we love and cherish.

Our God-given right to bear arms.

And if you're anything like us, you like to help preserve this legacy by showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

(Plus we find it’s a great snowflake repellent.)

That’s why we took this iconic number and had a little something engraved on our premium quality tumblers.

Because **I am 1776% sure no one will be taking my guns!**
---
| |
---
|
---
And nothing makes me feel more like a red-blooded American patriot...
Than sipping Kentucky’s finest out of this bad boy while watching a snowflake run for a “safe space.”

The best part is you can make a day of it since the double-wall insulation keeps cold drinks cold for 24 hours. (And hot drinks are hot for 8 hours!)

**This is the tumbler that makes drinks great again.

** Engraved by freedom-loving Americans in Boise, Idaho Food Grade 18/8 Stainless Steel Construction Fits and any truck or car cup holder Never rusts...even after collecting salty liberal tears Leak-proof lid for those bumpy roads or stormy fishing days Superior finish (Sweat-proof!) Fits 20oz of American whiskey, beer, water, coffee, etc 30-day money-back guarantee Makes the PERFECT gift This rugged tumbler is 100% awesome and 0% liberal.

So if you're unapologetically American and you like your beverages to stay icy cold, or scalding hot...

This Freedom Tumbler is for you.

And I have some excellent news for you today.

Because for a very limited time, [you can get your own Freedom Tumbler at just a fraction of the normal price.](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11283/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/0c3c0b8e0e2dc0e8d731b181839861e44e5ceed7)

If you were to go directly to our online store, you’d pay USD40 for this piece of badassery.

And we sell them at that price every single day of the week.

But I’m on a mission to make this thing go “viral.”

So right now you can get your very own Freedom Tumbler for only USD40 USD19.

Hell, at that price you can get one for you and a friend and still pay half of what one normally costs.

The only catch is, I set aside some of these for this special sale...and right now we only have 694 left as of the sending of this email!

And once those are gone you’ll have to pay the normal price of USD40.

I think we can both agree that USD19 is a small price to pay for showing your support for the 2nd amendment.

Plus pissing off whiny liberal snowflakes everywhere you go is _priceless._

**[GO HERE to claim your Freedom Tumbler for 50% OFF](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11283/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/0c3c0b8e0e2dc0e8d731b181839861e44e5ceed7)**

So if you're ready to trigger a liberal just by enjoying a tasty beverage, you better hurry.

Because this IS a limited-time offer and these WILL sell out fast.

We’ve mostly been getting orders for multiple tumblers at this incredible price, so I really don’t know how much longer these will be available.

But if you order now, your Freedom Tumbler will be delivered to your front door in the next 3-5 days.

And since you're backed by our 30-day, 100% guarantee...

There’s no risk on your part.

If you're not 100% satisfied, email our support team and we’ll refund you every penny. But I don’t see that happening, to be honest.

**Just look at what other 2nd amendment supporters are saying about their Freedom Tumblers**

“ _Fist bumps, thumbs up, smiles, and some gal passed me her number at Starbucks....so be ready.”_ **Robert B. – Omaha, NE**

_“When drinking from this tumbler, I have bald eagles wearing American flags as capes swoop down and land on my arm. I get the nods and the handshakes when walking around, rocking this tumbler. People appreciate my badassness when representing.”_ **Justin G. – Toledo, OH**

_“I bought one for myself, now every member of the family wants one.”_ **Lenny P. – Marcus Hook, PA**

Remember, these are only 50% off until I sell the remaining ones.

**[GO HERE to get your Freedom Tumbler now](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11283/6374453/7348cbe649a92fd54bd8e09768283620e61c9792/0c3c0b8e0e2dc0e8d731b181839861e44e5ceed7)**

There’s never been a more important time than now to stand up for our rights.

Thanks for being a fellow patriot!
---
|

---

subject: 3 Warriors: 1 grave injustice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
We owe it to them to fight for their freedom.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjpuo9376m3u5euilkrivbsgo9k38fidv9f3qgro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1lmsprdd3lcdij6pj46ppm9ctlcpqm9d71m4pr8pb0s3i31dtn6kqb8thi6crjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p76phmcspmcdtiehj3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmepj0s1j66ob0s8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zse29l7fq6bjncrs4veobbbs15f309ah34insar0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
Friend, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. _For every American._ These Warriors put on their uniforms every day - and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. **And they 're facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn't commit. **
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znups8uvo5is7poh8ekvd0e8umgfptq2tsr6fi30_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars.
---
[**GET JUSTICE FOR THE MARSOC 3**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkf363ovh597uuv144fm6tjbn0faos5nc31fpdhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines - the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for _hours_ , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his "friends" abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen.
**The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics._[FIGHT FOR JUSTICE >>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5lq6tgisc993fbp2ci0rnggg1frdmhvrfgg6vfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)_**
---
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zepa933ie8h0vt2fe18e49sn0ojm51vi4bk7i9d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
**_[Friend, we 're reaching out to freedom-loving Americans like you because we need YOUR help to defend the MARSOC 3.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgsmrk8libeiar3qler4emnjncltguejg4a3qte0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)_** United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we're approaching a critical milestone. **After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, a****January 17th****trial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron.** This is where you come in, friend. We're counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial.
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $100**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfdts0qseetb6t99v2pn5odk5jbq33hbaqeb8fm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $75**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp7rgi37b326avaunu8ev21ibqrffd52c70t7l5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $50**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6fcarf0n8fffnu7sr14mrhuu6nlqf7vf175m46o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: $35**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7b2qfqkfoetl3618gkn3bqv855b69jd0saek7so_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
[**CONTRIBUTE: OTHER**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z157aqrn3n44rjvrufo9ou770bcn6t584ijsvlng_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it's CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. **_[If you can, friend, please rush a critical donation to our Warrior Fund and help Gunnery Sergeants Danny Dreher and Joshua Negron of the MARSOC 3.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zp1s1dtqg8u6rgncenr60i49qf9n9mh5koek25vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)_**
---
[**RUSH A CRITICAL DONATION**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3nbh8h0ee4d60iejto04mpgk6k15bsn714p5kdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6c3g6cor1c3h2bs)
---
Thank you for your help. Semper Fi'

clean_body: We owe it to them to fight for their freedom. | | | Friend, When American Heroes take the oath to protect and serve by enlisting in our armed forces, they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice to defend freedom. For you. For me. For every American. These Warriors put on their uniforms every day - and they are willing to make the ultimate sacrifice in the name of freedom, liberty, and justice. Unfortunately, three of those very Heroes had the freedoms they worked so hard to protect ripped away from them. Chief Petty Officer Eric Gilmet and Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron were falsely accused of a heinous crime. Their defense team was threatened. And they 're facing up to 25 years in prison for a crime they didn't commit. What started as a regular night of celebration ended in a tragic death and three innocent Warriors facing life behind bars. It all started at a bar when a civilian contractor, who had been fighting with other customers, began a fight with a group of elite Marines - the MARSOC 3. The contractor was escorted from the bar, and all was well until Gilmet, Draher, and Negron decided to go home for the evening. Upon leaving the bar, the three Marines were confronted by the contractor. Despite trying to avoid a confrontation, the contractor struck one of the Warriors twice in the face and was in the process of throwing a third punch. In defense of his Marine brother, one of the men struck the contractor - just once - and sent him to the ground. The Marines stayed with the man for hours , even bringing him back to base for medical care throughout the night after his "friends" abandoned him. But, the contractor tragically passed due to complications from his intoxicated state. What followed was and still is one of the most unjust trials our military justice system has ever seen. The MARSOC 3 Raiders are still fighting against bias, unlawful command influence, and intense intimidation tactics. United American Patriots is working to prove these Heroes are innocent, and we're approaching a critical milestone. After waiting for over three years and numerous motion hearings, aJanuary 17thtrial date is scheduled for Gunnery Sergeants Danny Draher and Joshua Negron. This is where you come in, friend. We're counting on patriotic Americans like you to contribute to the UAP Warrior Fund to help these Heroes prepare for their trial. Our Warrior Fund covers the fees and associated defense expenses so our Heroes can access the best attorneys, investigators, and media experts. And it's CRITICAL for the days and weeks leading up to this long-awaited trial. Thank you for your help. Semper Fi' David "Bull" Gurfein LtCol., USMCR (Ret.) CEO, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed02473cfbcc43dd8d1fa4ba7613e353&_e=whxDdxJQi4kcwYt4d2MeIzs9uEv8e57kn_UGYUFUOMnZQh5JsaAKzz86IN9C36KHTQpPu8666ww3abJICdCH1IHL_2UN4L9Boi6Xn6Y9hJncNuivh8T-eanlm0-nVVXTxLQU_emNbfm6oIvk-iFChb-LSd4-i40LlYG7U5_nWSdCeqSfFVBSwm-aqkejFcNJSF_zxnoLW5hYWUi5LhO3-okMtxEC_PJDha9tVamIq9P744RimwGAc06X-zZ7jjz9JsvStxhAAK4PvPnwSPA0H-FOEBrlXhNDSawNfEufYqoPnB2pJpHXdZLl7jZ-xl-4MGvYJJ-yvB9ahpAbRj9FDFaPyzblCgEyUBXleGzSK1x67RJcdztdPewMVScLoAF-7-fQGHqE2Or3aj6epJ6LlBOnDmuZ9DqWHDbRaa2A_xt74JVM8n3Ab2AXSB0cxdlf)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed02473cfbcc43dd8d1fa4ba7613e353&_e=whxDdxJQi4kcwYt4d2MeIzs9uEv8e57kn_UGYUFUOMnZQh5JsaAKzz86IN9C36KHTQpPu8666ww3abJICdCH1IHL_2UN4L9Boi6Xn6Y9hJncNuivh8T-eanlm0-nVVXTxLQU_emNbfm6oIvk-iFChb-LSd4-i40LlYG7U5_nWSdCeqSfFVBSwm-aqkejFcNJSF_zxnoLW5hYWUi5LhO3-okMtxEC_PJDha9tVamIq9P744RimwGAc06X-zZ7jjz9JsvStxhAAK4PvPnwSPA0H0_hxCBa-C0buneWqeDhqe8kiOFsoSZTUNgyt8ot8Ud3ShJmzq8L_EBFY8SviCTb7VnSHf9PbW3TzzNVuMd4zs_twd2M3BQdQ5EFHdreoSGzNDjgmIscJ-MoSWwhOnNBERjBZUC7cFpjw5eobDnDYoB0sj-cG5yUx9K5rsaZ0Sf8)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed02473cfbcc43dd8d1fa4ba7613e353&_e=whxDdxJQi4kcwYt4d2MeIzs9uEv8e57kn_UGYUFUOMnZQh5JsaAKzz86IN9C36KHTQpPu8666ww3abJICdCH1IHL_2UN4L9Boi6Xn6Y9hJncNuivh8T-eanlm0-nVVXTxLQU_emNbfm6oIvk-iFChb-LSd4-i40LlYG7U5_nWSdCeqSfFVBSwm-aqkejFcNJSF_zxnoLW5hYWUi5LhO3-okMtxEC_PJDha9tVamIq9P744RimwGAc06X-zZ7jjz9JsvStxhAAK4PvPnwSPA0HyWW7_aGB0X5kANZO_8PWG7Xo-Iy004x8zXFR1m8sNKBc1hRrVQrbjLUrNVsK2h2zk0Sy-7TOc5Mfz7YYF47D4x3LPjVTyphkYopOomXfi4MGbZRRjuHbJ3NFnYm0S1VkurhzoWJvihUPnOPB_XdNJra-UXwz0hpp3EnwomhEnl4)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ed02473cfbcc43dd8d1fa4ba7613e353&_e=whxDdxJQi4kcwYt4d2MeIzs9uEv8e57kn_UGYUFUOMnZQh5JsaAKzz86IN9C36KHTQpPu8666ww3abJICdCH1IHL_2UN4L9Boi6Xn6Y9hJncNuivh8T-eanlm0-nVVXTxLQU_emNbfm6oIvk-iFChb-LSd4-i40LlYG7U5_nWSdCeqSfFVBSwm-aqkejFcNJSF_zxnoLW5hYWUi5LhO3-okMtxEC_PJDha9tVamIq9P744RimwGAc06X-zZ7jjz9JsvStxhAAK4PvPnwSPA0H-r5U5GPK4GSa9QbtUT06uA3p7Bnv9MeM34tW3d9kJixKeAKRQNTJdAGClI3EVD6Xjie5jVvp0vgR0YLdXc9pm6TMLuIizHgnoZPAJBFZ1phXEwO6iXzJRu-auMovUZDyrV9p_PypmutjwSD_xpEYK02Jas65umiJjjOWIt678JX).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:

For the first time in decades, Republicans failed 14 times to elect a Speaker of the House. Let me repeat that: Kevin McCarthy’s own Republicans rejected him – proving they are fighting themselves instead of fighting For The People. [**This changes everything for Democrats. Peter, extreme MAGA Republicans are bringing chaos, crisis, confusion and craziness to the People’s House.
This is our chance to show that while the party of "no" is totally out of control, Democrats are set to get big things done and deliver for the American people.
Keep the faith,
Hakeem

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57360108/387693148/-13555931?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTQ5Yzg3OC1mZTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjzDEjHggtAccKJTPS200C6hIHm1virlXGmGYFeR6nY=&emci=2fe4bd2c-fc91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b549c878-fe94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=21290350) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57360109/387693149/-1355360311?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTQ5Yzg3OC1mZTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjzDEjHggtAccKJTPS200C6hIHm1virlXGmGYFeR6nY=&emci=2fe4bd2c-fc91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b549c878-fe94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=21290350) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57360110/387693150/-737237221?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTQ5Yzg3OC1mZTk0LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjzDEjHggtAccKJTPS200C6hIHm1virlXGmGYFeR6nY=&emci=2fe4bd2c-fc91-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b549c878-fe94-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=21290350)

name: A Black Conservative
subject: The CBC is a Prop
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CURE AMERICA ACTION, INC
body:
We need to expose the Left's bigotry once and for all!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "Headline") Peter With a name like "Congressional Black Caucus," you would think being Black and a member of Congress gains you entry. NOPE! The Democrats just denied Byron Donalds, a Black Republican, from joining their elite group of leftist props. To Democrats, Byron isn't Black... simply because he dares to be a Republican. Rather than let a Black Man rise, Squad Member Cori Bush literally called Donalds a "prop" and accused him of furthering White Supremacy! It's time America stands up to these grifters on the left who demonize the Black men and women who proudly call themselves Republican. **[But that's only going to happen if you join the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "But that’s only going to happen if you join the fight with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** My name is Marc Little, and I am a pastor, attorney, Executive Director of CURE America Action, and proud Black Republican, and I KNOW that Black America needs people like Byron Donalds, a great example of the American Dream, who proudly stands as a Black Republican in Congress! We need Black conservatives in Congress because there is always a message [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "Banner")underlying every Democrat promise - you aren't good enough to do this on your own. **They tell Black Americans that they need the socialist state to solve their problems for them. But the facts demonstrate that when we elect Democrats, they fail Black America time and time again.** I'm sick of it. The CBC and Cori Bush's treatment of Byron Donalds is a slap in the face to Black America. They feel they must tear down Byron simply because he isn't a slave to the Democrats' will. **We need to expose their bigotry once and for all, but unfortunately, Black America won 't hear this from the media.** **[If you want to change the outcome of future elections and America's public policies, then I need your immediate donation to CURE America Action so we can go into these communities and expose the liberals for their decades of false hope.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "If you want to change the outcome of future elections and
America’s public policies, then I need your immediate donation to CURE America Action so we can go into these communities and expose the
liberals for their decades of false hope.")** You and I know the truth about the Democrats' agenda. We also know that Americans of all races, religions, and creed are suffering, and the Democrat Leadership is failing us -- again. **Democrats want Black America to fall in line, accept the failures of their progressive policies, and then remain ignorant when we 're told the Republican Party is to blame.** That's why they've come out so hard against Byron Donalds. The CBC, Cori Bush, and the Left think so little about Black Republicans like Byron Donalds and with him, Black America as a whole. With your support of CURE American Action, we can stop the cycle of lies and deceit by educating Black Americans on these facts and removing them from the 21st Century plantations. That's why when we bypass the liberal media and engage Black voters directly, we can save the next generation of Black Americans from being victims of the Democrat Party. **[Will you stand with us? Donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "Will you stand with us? Donate today.")** God Bless America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62203649:6vChg-GdN:m:1:3331421248:1B80A0C7AB636DD2DE1552C1A2EBCA80:r "Marc Little")
Marc Little
Executive Director
CURE America Action

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=174b4a0612bc4943864a3a4b14b730fa&_e=ILnRWdHGaT_aoezR0n747mdN4HDsvh4J8aDY5Zcf-0lkzsveuWLurmvnoBCz4A8d28UfjH_t0KYmjaBxk10ECUwO7o0CiEPKTz1hNpZUHix5Hj7oyLmjDXobulIhguzo-kOI10O7Xk4rNjCBSqRqkehYqSUHBPi8yEKGM-b9FDhsX2jrF9cuwx3ctrFaD2dUbbzPjMevJ0LXe_0aospBC-CAN9FyytMeQwwzeHQ8M60WvbMVTs6FskdDXGcWhpEu7T5p-v8Cdrb6FJd4Q1P3ML0WpM5MixzbLb4YnzuNtjpAOdUupi_QQGB1SVy1C7wS_NWnFa8anyR78Jy6a_xkq40X4mpSYWaHOaWlz1lCRQY_cYgBMoqBsy9TDST1dBsql0dkTB267TfBNYX-Na3XWQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=174b4a0612bc4943864a3a4b14b730fa&_e=ILnRWdHGaT_aoezR0n747mdN4HDsvh4J8aDY5Zcf-0lkzsveuWLurmvnoBCz4A8d28UfjH_t0KYmjaBxk10ECUwO7o0CiEPKTz1hNpZUHix5Hj7oyLmjDXobulIhguzo-kOI10O7Xk4rNjCBSqRqkehYqSUHBPi8yEKGM-b9FDhsX2jrF9cuwx3ctrFaD2dUbbzPjMevJ0LXe_0aospBC-CAN9FyytMeQwwzeHQ8M60WvbMVTs6FskdDXGcWhpEuJd2QShbNZY8jmGrqiIc-f4iubt1l8AEQ6k0VaEUczn2gWfBBcm-aCRPHBZ0LaB37rPQeh4eMDiDJ0591N6QRe_7QjUO5YPMsy2S7JM7VQPix5yb0_G1fbzy9FXgTAQ-uw9lbhOdTVfUb6B0cIABO9w%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=174b4a0612bc4943864a3a4b14b730fa&_e=ILnRWdHGaT_aoezR0n747mdN4HDsvh4J8aDY5Zcf-0lkzsveuWLurmvnoBCz4A8d28UfjH_t0KYmjaBxk10ECUwO7o0CiEPKTz1hNpZUHix5Hj7oyLmjDXobulIhguzo-kOI10O7Xk4rNjCBSqRqkehYqSUHBPi8yEKGM-b9FDhsX2jrF9cuwx3ctrFaD2dUbbzPjMevJ0LXe_0aospBC-CAN9FyytMeQwwzeHQ8M60WvbMVTs6FskdDXGcWhpEu13BhKkSixjCm-9kHd9pqntSvBU8w4TVYy97uZdliytAUazR4TNgb9Xxt0x51xCzQ29XXkWVEr0wHYrHGXhQ_TNtW-A5hAmm_WCSJAcXqL74W1If_FyagL5hKnCxpMWIZqzrOGnn1dZx7V72c2aOAlA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Conservatives Give
subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bec1f7604ba646bea284cd1b03c75e21&_e=OJHcVBtcYXJg7mbe4qvJ4XNGqeW51RDgjngrKAee2Yfhr06b8YRQuXvMZ0xfTOK6ceoKOoz80ep-TvbYw7ql6SSNns_9-ZNlwCHey_KysP9mHMYffxjSvMuA7ad8q75z8OGwbK1VOKowLI_dZJXNJrpd4wc-p_vovGWTbFUpPFqm0MOmkS4tINid4GqsSBpxV7-qjI_0Oj_PXav9kfXpD5RdG4yRYNHt-j5OZUQ6JNkj14ddRf4ngFvLBAZxY0k1mnE7Rc59Rd2tlTNh168imh-89AuI9jNsXZ7ueEDqO-ilOjqCSqfinQpfQ9m8VHaCDHL22IMCxYr7619hbCviM_RePv9gohlVUgWzGcNYfWqf7qbT6BW2fFn0E4ScoH_9YRiVwdByTq3QQockp--Mdw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bec1f7604ba646bea284cd1b03c75e21&_e=OJHcVBtcYXJg7mbe4qvJ4XNGqeW51RDgjngrKAee2Yfhr06b8YRQuXvMZ0xfTOK6ceoKOoz80ep-TvbYw7ql6SSNns_9-ZNlwCHey_KysP9mHMYffxjSvMuA7ad8q75z8OGwbK1VOKowLI_dZJXNJrpd4wc-p_vovGWTbFUpPFqm0MOmkS4tINid4GqsSBpxV7-qjI_0Oj_PXav9kfXpD5RdG4yRYNHt-j5OZUQ6JNmuLaZfR_R6YL7jzHTZTvjEZvyGLN_wjDzSufOPB0uvFbLsjDnNEpT4lJTbXCZf9rCKpsdg0dNtQWbLZ-T-C7lewW4jfGYsRlwKwGnED3XJ4Lr4aQbcueblvJcVy8ehdODXxgYxNsWdNdtadk2_FhuPL2LRCj6Rfd9VZuxX-RY6CA%3D%3D)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bec1f7604ba646bea284cd1b03c75e21&_e=OJHcVBtcYXJg7mbe4qvJ4XNGqeW51RDgjngrKAee2Yfhr06b8YRQuXvMZ0xfTOK6ceoKOoz80ep-TvbYw7ql6SSNns_9-ZNlwCHey_KysP9mHMYffxjSvMuA7ad8q75z8OGwbK1VOKowLI_dZJXNJrpd4wc-p_vovGWTbFUpPFqm0MOmkS4tINid4GqsSBpxV7-qjI_0Oj_PXav9kfXpD5RdG4yRYNHt-j5OZUQ6JNltNYJxQwW0WUO2a342V9Uw_Zj-SHNsS2ktsSpNKALuF6gxv0cAY0OicnxxGgJJEyBzS4Ysbm3G5_CqvfIUv_zTCVtgDQxAoobz4bir432-eaCdIeXKK8c9WuIvGHbpMQYhNvEtFstYM19hrcCVLwx7-7GXkvhFXkzLHTo_jdJfQw%3D%3D)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College |

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 [**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=bec1f7604ba646bea284cd1b03c75e21&_t=bEHjdX1BePRYZAQOebYWlIGCD5OHrawUZRfCJlFa3c6OYHjCzlc9ipNBH5369uz7i_jXb74Yl6VOTQyDRopYxXe78jNHYzZ6aGjMT8gmA9MYvEyLh16R7iMwzZyEY_ZKnArJlnHdqAJRwQim3847CpDadnaA-lUMnwsbpH-hggw%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, “**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**.”

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDE1LTMyMzU2ODgxMDZlZTQ1MzFiZTJlMTU0NGI1MWQ5NTMzIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL2xwLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvYW1lcmljYW4tbGVmdC1wcmVyZWdpc3Rlci8_c2M9MDA0OTdOMDI0MkwyMURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFtZXJpY2FubGVmdCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD12MV9BRV9GRk8zNDM5NCJ9/Dp2mQgSR24alpLFc13JBig)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

The fair maps movement is about more than redistricting. This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity.
All On The Line’s campaign has laid the foundation for why fair maps are crucial for our democracy. Our work so far made a real impact by folks like you -- and we’ve made significant progress toward a better tomorrow.
[**But make no mistake -- there is more work to be done.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57361541/387698147/742344613?refcode=20230115_AOTL_F_picthisresend_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmYTg4NWQ4LTA2OTUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1dlKvj6xgMO0N9zL7P0XvbdwhOI5EAnDDog91sPZHk=)
Generations to come are depending on folks, like you and me, fighting to ensure there’s a strong democracy that takes communities’ issues to heart. This year, we will continue to press forward with those principles of fairness and justice as we prepare for redraws in states like North Carolina and to push back against voter suppression initiatives like in Ohio.
As you begin the new year, let the people be your source of what a strong democracy looks like. **_Each of us has the power to ensure that we don’t just picture a better tomorrow, we will live it._**
[**Make that difference today and give All On The Line a boost for 2023 with your donation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57361542/387698149/742344613?refcode=20230115_AOTL_F_picthisresend_redlite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmYTg4NWQ4LTA2OTUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s1dlKvj6xgMO0N9zL7P0XvbdwhOI5EAnDDog91sPZHk=)

clean_body: | Team, = Your son is starting elementary school with the biggest smile on his face. Throughout the day you’re anticipating the excitement of him coming home. The bell rings. Is he there? = A pregnant woman living in rural Alabama with no access to reproductive healthcare leaving her with no choice in how to handle potentially life-threatening decisions. = Your children are finally able to vote -- but they live in a district where their voice is not heard and their vote is diluted by gerrymandering. = When I joined All On The Line -- I saw that those very real experiences were the driving force behind each organizer, strategist, and advocate. Our fight has always been about the people and their real-life experiences. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The fair maps movement is about more than redistricting. This movement is about freedom, justice, and equity. All On The Line’s campaign has laid the foundation for why fair maps are crucial for our democracy. Our work so far made a real impact by folks like you -- and we’ve made significant progress toward a better tomorrow. = Generations to come are depending on folks, like you and me, fighting to ensure there’s a strong democracy that takes communities’ issues to heart. This year, we will continue to press forward with those principles of fairness and justice as we prepare for redraws in states like North Carolina and to push back against voter suppression initiatives like in Ohio. As you begin the new year, let the people be your source of what a strong democracy looks like. Each of us has the power to ensure that we don’t just picture a better tomorrow, we will live it. = For freedom and justice, Emuni Sanderson Mobilization Strategist All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Good News!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Chip in anything you can before the deadline at midnight >>
#

Friends — we have some good news and some better news.
**The good news is:** Our first mid-month fundraising deadline of 2023 is coming up tonight at midnight and we’re so close to hitting our goals.
**The better news is:** We still have a few hours to go and with your support, we’re confident we’ll crush this first goal and keep up our momentum.
We’re proud to have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. This team has been powered by generous folks like you and that means so much to Mark and this entire team.
So, before the deadline at midnight, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make your first $3 donation before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight? The amount you donate isn’t as important as the donation itself because this has always been a people-powered team.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan23.GMKlXM&refcode=em230115-1-7&t=1&akid=4882%2E6688874%2EwDjeYr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-jan23.QPsbHr&refcode=em230115-1-7&t=20&akid=4882%2E6688874%2EwDjeYr)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57362098/387700459/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzU5YjlmOWEtMDg5NS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1GBL5zO0sa_oFkpj72iOGtALxOCVhC3HktjLJ_-Vts=)
---
Lucy McBath is one of our biggest assets in the fight for gun control in this country. In 2012, Lucy lost her son to senseless gun violence. His tragic death inspired her to leave her 30-year-long career at Delta Airlines and become a gun control advocate, working with Everytown for Gun Safety and Moms Demand Action. But after the Parkland shooting, Lucy knew she had to do more. That's when she ran for Congress, taking on an NRA-backed candidate in a seat once held by Newt Gingrich. And she won! Georgia elections are always tough because of the Republican voter suppression efforts all over the state. We need to have Lucy’s back in order to flip the House next year. [_**We need Lucy McBath fighting for us in Congress — especially with gun control laws on the line. You can support her and the rest of our endorsed candidates by chipping in any amount today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57362099/387700460/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzU5YjlmOWEtMDg5NS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1GBL5zO0sa_oFkpj72iOGtALxOCVhC3HktjLJ_-Vts=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57362100/387700461/-1914796982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzU5YjlmOWEtMDg5NS1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=M1GBL5zO0sa_oFkpj72iOGtALxOCVhC3HktjLJ_-Vts=)

clean_body: | = Lucy McBath is one of our biggest assets in the fight for gun control in this country. In 2012, Lucy lost her son to senseless gun violence. His tragic death inspired her to leave her 30-year-long career at Delta Airlines and become a gun control advocate, working with Everytown for Gun Safety and Moms Demand Action. But after the Parkland shooting, Lucy knew she had to do more. That's when she ran for Congress, taking on an NRA-backed candidate in a seat once held by Newt Gingrich. And she won! Georgia elections are always tough because of the Republican voter suppression efforts all over the state. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: reflections on Dr. King’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-jan2023-fr-january?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Friends,

Today we honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and reflect on his ideas and activism.

From voting rights for Black Americans to public education equity to striving for an end to poverty, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s tireless work has impacted generations as we strive for liberty and justice for all to this day.

His legacy is the heartbeat of the social justice movement today and is a great source of inspiration for me as a lawmaker. And while we are still living in a divisive, difficult time in our nation’s history, it’s powerful forces like Dr. King that give me hope that we can once again make bold, progressive changes for the social good of the country.

With these ideas in mind, I recommit to Dr. King’s vision for total political enfranchisement and voting freedom. And I invite you, friends, to reflect on Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s life and legacy with me.

— Eric Swalwell

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sharing the big news with you personally, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter:
**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.**
The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.
But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.
**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority. **
**[Please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Patty Murray to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57362765/387701682/-664471032?refcode=pm_em_230115_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI0NTY5MC0wYzk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sn02H5xVnD0mERcxXPIWvMSWcBkr3-j1vadaZdIzYVk=)**
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.
But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.
**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win. ****[Please, Peter, will you split $5 between my campaign and Patty Murray to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57362766/387701683/-664471032?refcode=pm_em_230115_1_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzI0NTY5MC0wYzk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sn02H5xVnD0mERcxXPIWvMSWcBkr3-j1vadaZdIzYVk=)**

Kirsten

name: VoteVets
subject: $5, please.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That is the donation we’re asking you to make before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight.
#
$5.
That is the donation we’re asking you to make before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight. Yes, Derek, $5.
$5 to help us continue our fight against far-right disinformation targeting Veterans.
$5 to help us fight in the critical legislative fights already underway in the newly divided Congress.
And $5 because this is going to be the most important election in modern American history. Control of the House, Senate and presidency are all on the line and VoteVets is one of the most critical voices in those fights.
We know that $5, especially this early may not seem like it will make a difference. But two things: First, it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. Lots of people have given their $5, now they need you to do the same.
But also, VoteVets was one of the most effective outside organizations last cycle. We helped save MANY House races. If we had more money, we might control the House today. So we’re starting now.
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $5 before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight tonight?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230115-1-15&t=1&akid=7285%2E3013755%2ErOteae)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.Pk7gBV&amount=3&refcode=em230115-1-15&t=2&akid=7285%2E3013755%2ErOteae)
---
Thank you in advance for helping us reach our goals today.
The team at VoteVets

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Ingrid Centurion
subject: Education First as we Honor Martin Luther King Jr
body:
Denmark Vesey, self-educated Black man who planned the most extensive slave rebellion in U.S. history (Charleston, 1822). In 1800 Denmark pu
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/b1OMmviI2/c?w=BkoERxAYoSspOXgVR1Ui-bhDv5gZlMhXjs7rlFIGIUY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS9zby9iMU9NbXZpSTI_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIwMzcyYjMxOS1jM2FmLTRlMTUtYTIxNi00OTAxY2E1YWQ1M2QifQ)_**

| | |
---
| |
---
| | Hi D. P., The Martin Luther King holiday serves multiple purposes: It honors the total legacy of King; focuses on the issue of civil rights; highlights the use of nonviolence to promote change; and calls people into public service. He led a number of peaceful protests, such as the famous March on Washington in 1963. He was awarded the [Nobel Peace Prize](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/b1OMmviI2/c?w=5j6gXVJueZeOLEDkYWW4tuZXzpKCjczSpZIH3UrX6p8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJpdGFubmljYS5jb20vdG9waWMvTm9iZWwtUHJpemUiLCJyIjoiNjE1MDU1ODctODc5MS00NzdhLTVjYTQtYzc3MzJkNTYzZGNjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0) in 1964. He was my hero growing up as a child. I strive to be the great orator and public servant and fight for all citizens regardless of race, color or religion. I am calling people into public service because never has the United States seen more evidence of tribalism. We must return to the Martin Luther King, Jr. “content of our character” policy – one that views race as incidental rather than essential to who we are. God Bless, Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
Denmark Vesey, self-educated Black man who planned the most extensive slave rebellion in U.S. history (Charleston, 1822). In 1800 Denmark purchased his freedom with $600 he had won in a street lottery.
|
---
Joseph H. Rainey, who was born into slavery in 1832 & went on to become the nation's first Black congressman. Elected to the 41st Congress (1869–1871), Rainey took his seat as the first African American to serve in the House on December 12, 1870.
|
---
Marjorie Amost-Frazier, “a one-person social service agency w/ a sweet demeanor & a will of steel,” spent her life breaking down barriers. The first woman to be elected to the Charleston County Council in 1974.
| |
---
| | Train with a Parliamentarian at Generations for AmericaPublic Service - Its time for you to get involved.Weekly Meetings (Friday) 11AM - Noon - Chao Guia, 408 Redbank Road in Goose Creek, Local Representatives will speak and will engage our members in Civic Discussions.
---
| | |
---
| | The essence of efficient meetings can happen by learning Parliamentarian Procedures and the Robert's Rules of Order. If you would like me to speak on this topic in your community, please let me know. Find out more at [Generations for America](https://www.generationsforamerica.com/so/b1OMmviI2/c?w=zWgrNpwSlQgaBiPMggkFd4XpQrfmy7sNBUT4OEhiKKU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ2VuZXJhdGlvbnNmb3JhbWVyaWNhLmNvbS9ldmVudHMiLCJyIjoiYTc3OGQ2ZmItZjAwYy00NGRlLWRlYWUtN2IwMThmODc2NGEwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMDM3MmIzMTktYzNhZi00ZTE1LWEyMTYtNDkwMWNhNWFkNTNkIn0).

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e069809bd0f6413bad121abc96015fd8&_e=7vTOJX3pQ5_dhKu7EuVeqsrwWScz6XVCyGZ0-4bW7FAwU2FGULX3VTWSY2foHolD_hVI5gPrsvMasgx0Vq3ejsp_I7svCpyqjVE_GWc7Dkk-5oGuKQQ_FW5YE9B5kYmciaYHQAWQWFIEYT797lNrFlwP5Yr7khJPwp917Tx6wTHfgEjbWMDsjB_l9iFBn7AmvbvkebzLjZilE_irwV4z17QBfWUCIdRSAURXNKSL1chXndCJcX7kLlhj3yYxzlvzXKI1bZ7YrEgYdgNt8c6YTkQ8z5d6tsf226FMJO6xGOvm0_bv-am79TG6Tae9jEJpjHWmNvhRD9ES3zpa7UHdRJUCd92RQYlayMvRANr0E9U4nN9cqRe-FN2sDOwmPQi764IvLgAaGyLuQFTljAYtzw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e069809bd0f6413bad121abc96015fd8&_e=7vTOJX3pQ5_dhKu7EuVeqsrwWScz6XVCyGZ0-4bW7FAwU2FGULX3VTWSY2foHolD_hVI5gPrsvMasgx0Vq3ejsp_I7svCpyqjVE_GWc7Dkk-5oGuKQQ_FW5YE9B5kYmciaYHQAWQWFIEYT797lNrFlwP5Yr7khJPwp917Tx6wTHfgEjbWMDsjB_l9iFBn7AmvbvkebzLjZilE_irwV4z17QBfWUCIdRSAURXNKSL1chXndCJcX7kLlhj3yYxzlvzRAi7fVycqneg66XzAH5sIlj6B4B9Q_BDxP8ATRUjwPA4xdFkTLTQVd2qWbp6u0sF85LTOp7tZhZ4wVqjMuUQAhi00lDqoBHlae1KPitvFwr1UgOJ-cYOyRSURH8S27nJimSgfVLvRnhmoC5XcHTc5g%3D%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e069809bd0f6413bad121abc96015fd8&_e=7vTOJX3pQ5_dhKu7EuVeqsrwWScz6XVCyGZ0-4bW7FAwU2FGULX3VTWSY2foHolD_hVI5gPrsvMasgx0Vq3ejsp_I7svCpyqjVE_GWc7Dkk-5oGuKQQ_FW5YE9B5kYmciaYHQAWQWFIEYT797lNrFlwP5Yr7khJPwp917Tx6wTHfgEjbWMDsjB_l9iFBn7AmvbvkebzLjZilE_irwV4z17QBfWUCIdRSAURXNKSL1chXndCJcX7kLlhj3yYxzlvzgypVfNIUCvTCaj5P8i1FR2OKNXwDch9qs72dobeQ-v7SYF55vKZLNgOe-C2EojvwyXwyS_wiGKJJ_aQ3MLmkw6EHqfirBFP6feCBxeNSvVoHBWUsMq-AP7iCtT2LRBOwyxg18_YJIlG0zr_dUn2FYA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
