name: Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e7404d96a34f819e5f2868c046280d&_e=GD4IWz3K7hb3kat4zeQf55lKwCNhMoJDgQF0oU5aU4ixce-3VjWIPyD2v1O2yXqz7tjy7Kv4oX4UbBQOs-32fFn8v-_vHITg552qq1fPe4VOW1FqCm7kMc_eaF_3y0waHFA-Z9AsjUL0fXb92s5OjTaJfI8PMzzoJ5zrN8qUynoh6HwsS6E8jxIuSHh6R98TyB78hrtPuNtojdSdoY3X2Dv-dzy-rvi2mFO8gOx2SBo2hPwpYOoWrg3YRhls10XhESWd1EE7LbznYA1p2iuMw9yPodTEyFAXuwV1lsGGdRAvKbXxlRrIfCciOhxUlYKBodJJ53oQRJPY8TOrx3peQVj6Xjx0AYxIBJVphlL50xbtVM25WPSqsDaJWuQ9NbRLouLlOUMfQvgWIkEUFZdP0voZMtjvepfbO5uEUsuAC2J36cGe6UlV1MWCgP8-nkTU)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e7404d96a34f819e5f2868c046280d&_e=GD4IWz3K7hb3kat4zeQf55lKwCNhMoJDgQF0oU5aU4ixce-3VjWIPyD2v1O2yXqz7tjy7Kv4oX4UbBQOs-32fFn8v-_vHITg552qq1fPe4VOW1FqCm7kMc_eaF_3y0waHFA-Z9AsjUL0fXb92s5OjTaJfI8PMzzoJ5zrN8qUynoh6HwsS6E8jxIuSHh6R98TyB78hrtPuNtojdSdoY3X2Dv-dzy-rvi2mFO8gOx2SBo2hPwpYOoWrg3YRhls10XhESWd1EE7LbznYA1p2iuMw8_DczHvLgDdsFJ_RWMZ0Bnx21ag-OVjMyE_znnphAxLUcQ9kjfOjHGycJhaNUHjkB-_uxax5KeHjingEoK9XqtPom0BM4QTJ_4symgWInj0Vqn3EUBqeAe5f9mulompo13a8aarBcdudB9ICVKVau_N1nhwOp3-jWvc0Dstnfhq)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e7404d96a34f819e5f2868c046280d&_e=GD4IWz3K7hb3kat4zeQf55lKwCNhMoJDgQF0oU5aU4ixce-3VjWIPyD2v1O2yXqz7tjy7Kv4oX4UbBQOs-32fFn8v-_vHITg552qq1fPe4VOW1FqCm7kMc_eaF_3y0waHFA-Z9AsjUL0fXb92s5OjTaJfI8PMzzoJ5zrN8qUynoh6HwsS6E8jxIuSHh6R98TyB78hrtPuNtojdSdoY3X2Dv-dzy-rvi2mFO8gOx2SBo2hPwpYOoWrg3YRhls10XhESWd1EE7LbznYA1p2iuMw67alGqSTqMm8M3N4Kgd5Z-eGHrfGuhflHsXU0U98KBPoj6uIf1QKq9cM8tRr3gv7fqQ9jNzrDxgYn1AbFEj6woisQJ4Yl7Soznr8Izm1gOg_HYCUDLZJSI7uCsgi0crWbgy8BEknUbJcLHxwcWcja3ygGwuk-23536IG13DniJQ)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=31e7404d96a34f819e5f2868c046280d&_e=GD4IWz3K7hb3kat4zeQf55lKwCNhMoJDgQF0oU5aU4ixce-3VjWIPyD2v1O2yXqz7tjy7Kv4oX4UbBQOs-32fFn8v-_vHITg552qq1fPe4VOW1FqCm7kMc_eaF_3y0waHFA-Z9AsjUL0fXb92s5OjTaJfI8PMzzoJ5zrN8qUynoh6HwsS6E8jxIuSHh6R98TyB78hrtPuNtojdSdoY3X2Dv-dzy-rvi2mFO8gOx2SBo2hPwpYOoWrg3YRhls10XhESWd1EE7LbznYA1p2iuMwwvVNyTAwFkxLAW3BMnwf2P-7WBn5OpK6Ne0fvuu_P1VS02ryow_zgNy35t5I2XWtDmY8wl6bCBa8eh425S06M9cK5rPjErmpy4-MLomxzDzpFk9H4bVfo9__4O9ymL8xSgzWlh3UX7pHtk54a0BCHBo9K7BbDOjrv0SzLxkykJ_).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Here is the truth: they emailed because VoteVets is one of the most effective progressive organizations out there, and they’ve both seen it first-hand.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $3 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m hoping to see an outpouring of support before our mid-month fundraising drive ends tonight
#

I know it’s a Sunday morning, so I won’t make this long. I’m reaching out to ask you to [**make a contribution to Giffords PAC before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230115-1-15&t=1&akid=4045%2E3935704%2EPjvzz2)
We started the year off strong with our 10 Year Anniversary Fundraising Drive. I’m so thankful to everyone who contributed in honor of this important milestone for our organization.
But we’ve seen donations drop off over the past few days, and we can’t afford to see our fundraising momentum slow down as we quickly close in on our first mid-month deadline of the year.
A future free from gun violence is possible, but we need to have the resources to help advocate for gun safety laws across the country. With the new Republican majority in the U.S. House of Representatives and a narrowly divided Senate, we are going to have to fight harder than ever to pass more commonsense gun safety legislation at the federal level.
[**So I’m humbly asking: Will you contribute $3 or any amount you can before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230115-1-15&t=2&akid=4045%2E3935704%2EPjvzz2)

name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a88d04f2e774156b8f778a4dea6f55a&_e=Db9vBEvO5feG5ZKvJO8W1CK76EN7macaYs8H_fG8HX9De2ufXFjJFNnaCGuTobRsg7AJ0xxj7rGtv9xJr0xvO5TqCfc33OI0mbhJVUx63hwwWecvBkoMLOmeqa5vAMTydrBPq0cVumNzOmGfklKqFbHx6Hvrq86K81Gcd51YVE4XvTwr0DJLYkF6O0XPXXC0DUsom7FS1eScKrZdK41QWOmvYC4A-fJ1ATm8tQGJ02_myYT0JhDuvyLHYesANFrAU1-eMEv8pRzLxU4zSD_JubERpBzhiWvcWQKTkQGEAtk%3D). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

clean_body: The Food Crisis of 2023 We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling . Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because: 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food is designed to last for 25 years , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too. You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve. Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food." And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out. You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest! And that's not all, because... FREE Bonus #1: because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you 2 of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Will you give your endorsement, Derek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need your support today.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)
Derek,
It’s official: Katie Porter is running to represent California in the U.S. Senate!
**[Can you add your name to personally endorse Katie and become one of our campaign’s first official supporters? We want you on our team.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF15_1_END_20230115_V1_F&t=2&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)**
**[Endorse Katie ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF15_1_END_20230115_V1_F&t=3&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)**
Katie is running for Senate to continue the work she’s always done, taking on powerful special interests, lowering costs for families, and securing a sustainable future for future generations.
**She’s one of the few Members of Congress who rejects corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, and she’s leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.**
With Democrats having just a single-seat majority in the Senate, we need a warrior willing to fight for working people and families in Washington. **Katie Porter is that warrior, Derek.**
From securing free COVID tests for all Americans, to showing how corporate profits have driven inflation and introducing legislation to actually hold them accountable, Katie and her whiteboard have taken on our nation’s most powerful. A single-parent of three kids, Katie believes “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough.
Katie Porter will fight for _all_ of us in the Senate. And we’re just getting started.
**[We need your support to build a better California and a better country, Derek. Please add your name today to become one of our first official supporters and personally endorse Katie Porter for Senate.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF15_1_END_20230115_V1_F&t=4&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)**
**[Endorse Katie ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse?source=EMAF15_1_END_20230115_V1_F&t=5&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)**
Thank you for your support,
Katie Porter for California HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF15_1_END_20230115_V1_F&t=6&refcode2=15808_3422442_-EjiVk&akid=15808%2E3422442%2E-EjiVk)**

clean_body: We need your support today. Derek, It’s official: Katie Porter is running to represent California in the U.S. Senate! Katie is running for Senate to continue the work she’s always done, taking on powerful special interests, lowering costs for families, and securing a sustainable future for future generations. She’s one of the few Members of Congress who rejects corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, and she’s leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. With Democrats having just a single-seat majority in the Senate, we need a warrior willing to fight for working people and families in Washington. Katie Porter is that warrior, Derek. From securing free COVID tests for all Americans, to showing how corporate profits have driven inflation and introducing legislation to actually hold them accountable, Katie and her whiteboard have taken on our nation’s most powerful. A single-parent of three kids, Katie believes “better than the way things were” isn’t good enough. Katie Porter will fight for all of us in the Senate. And we’re just getting started. Thank you for your support, Katie Porter for California HQ Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Joe Biden
subject: I hope you’ll take this chance to chip in to the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Will you support the DNC with a donation? | |
---
Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: _I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation._ **I mean it.** Last November we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. **This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone.** **[Will you chip in a few bucks -- or even $7 -- to the DNC? Whatever you can afford to give will go a long way in safeguarding our progress and electing more Democrats in the years to come.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wACnsPEIiRS7LuVBOIrplrAHg97kztwb4FNDbT87ndBwi5AAkPH5VD71HYHg2eYv5Q1DmXY5z2NZwK_pYJvE9wvPO_k6FvB9CzofqA5at7Lj87__mdxDtMmqRFzNIOkKsvrV8_CFGKnUX1Ye74_qezwJDw3cU2ckE7CpWxUT3nPg1eB850mzMOfAzh0wsNyts1FhfPJvagunpA78WvllKY5Rl3j5MWbwPp3rswirXAynHToWRVDtlmddxakbq_qI12HLwii1-vWs67oqmdq17w4YPffeFkNUq6Do7X0ptH2HnM0orNpMtkVBNKIBMH0PxbVdSiOPGzlcEl_RFKdOn9NMIY_dLMRy2bdKAAneD9V3mDNMu7CNVVPoctJVj_maP80JdG-hUX58au6aQqHinNZTRCi-iE-Hx3ubt9_aHLPbTMmImRCR180nfQdIYnhgE/3sv/B2WM-cjMQcmn-kn78fRNdA/h0/YLXyRU2HgvDxWtXLWzK6aSIThKCMFHiOcdmgAobyvjQ)**

clean_body: Will you support the DNC with a donation? | | Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. I mean it. Last November we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. We’ve got to keep up our work of electing Democrats at every level and building a better America -- and the DNC’s work is integral to it. I really appreciate your support, Derek. God love ya. name: Adam Schiff
subject: He’s told Fox News. He’s told his list of email supporters. Kevin McCarthy is once again threatening vengeance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1588%2E5257348%2EXiTY_y ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Kevin McCarthy is emailing his supporters and telling any Capitol Hill
reporter who cares to listen the same thing: He is following through on
his promise to remove me from the House Intelligence Committee for holding
Trump and his allies accountable for their attack on our democracy.

He is even giving donors a button to push if they want to eject me from
the committee, and using one of the most important committees in Congress
as a political plaything.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230115-stand-with-adam-vsp.9GXfRy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230115_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1588%2E5257348%2EXiTY_y ]Email from Kevin McCarthy. Subject line: I'm FIRING Omar, Swalwell, and
Schiff. Email reads: Are you sick of Ilhan Omar, Eric Swalwell, Adam Schiff &
their antics? I am. Now that we've taken back the majority, I'm putting a stop
to this and taking Ilhan Omar off of the Foreign Affairs Committee and Eric
Swalwell and Adam Schiff off of the Intelligence Committee. Buttons: FIRE ILHAN
HOMAR FIRE ERIC SWALWELL FIRE ADAM SCHIFF

But this is so much bigger than that.

One of Republicans’ very first acts of Congress was to open a new
“Investigate the Investigators” committee. It’s all about validating their
“deep state” conspiracy theories and their dangerous nonsense.

This is a naked attempt to undermine the legitimate investigation of
Donald Trump’s incitement of a violent attack on the Capitol — an
investigation that implicates the very Republican House members who are
now trying to sit on this committee.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230115-stand-with-adam-vsp.9GXfRy&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230115_AM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1588%2E5257348%2EXiTY_y ]I spoke out against the formation of this committee on the House floor.
Derek, add your name to stand with me.

the good ol’ days | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
I was just thinking about simpler times. When gas was cheaper, our economy was booming, and local schools weren’t infiltrated by the woke mob. Those were truly the good ol’ days.

[**TAKE ME BACK TO THE GOOD OL’ DAYS**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=11a191fdc58640c593422de7730b81cc&_e=WqHpeb8kuHFYz6YZhSjRzz9LARPRerPAt5QuDVNS1yuN7Wv8Z5n1XAHRCuHpe1DTrIKfMLsUKCT2bbCqdhf6bRg0zAJMhw2Db0SQlLFVdI66ibMY1jr6oVmAT2afohzkA23ZljW5BCJAKlsRUcfikiLq4NEsycIs_YjbjAbd51FG8b2zwH0sK6RmkeT8CqdS1KFUg1dDmq3pQNjQYScb1kWvSc1XXiUKi6YXWCMHvDvhYPRUQaAD5x9Kksvxobl3an2QCcyb0a_s3W2grDeGr_eTamAoGqzxtr-UQW_N9vJ5TLXLh7QYrZt2XUr-WkelqgWCgl1dcq22HoT_4oLxBX2XbMvpiSo4yepVCwzrx_jaP-XlEqVBP-c7ETGWZSIKqTV-bDoxrxHf1jx-uIAZzWG2diLvtqpDZqjASSfbXyM%3D)
---
I hate to snap you back to reality, but that’s not the America we’re living in anymore — we’re in Joe Biden’s America. And while I wish more than anything we could turn back time to BEFORE the failure-in-chief took office, that’s not an option. What we can do is SHOW UP for the conservative agenda and the Republican Party. Are you with me? This is a time sensitive matter, Fellow Conservative.

[**I’M WITH THE GOP**](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=11a191fdc58640c593422de7730b81cc&_e=WqHpeb8kuHFYz6YZhSjRzz9LARPRerPAt5QuDVNS1yuN7Wv8Z5n1XAHRCuHpe1DTrIKfMLsUKCT2bbCqdhf6bRg0zAJMhw2Db0SQlLFVdI66ibMY1jr6oVmAT2afohzkA23ZljW5BCJAKlsRUcfikiLq4NEsycIs_YjbjAbd51FG8b2zwH0sK6RmkeT8CqdS1KFUg1dDmq3pQNjQYScb1kWvSc1XXiUKi6YXWCMHvDvhYPRUQaAD5x9Kksvxobl3an2QCcyb0a_s3W2grDeGrzbPHRutqJnBDexcPTtmLOH9_tNYk8G9NNWBYIX79O1AfiEhQ8aE_KZw2K669_ppdZRJCbbOwuQ4YlACsfHXZudvazM2cdbIKXWEC8I-7IG0MrCiCfoimwonjD_JFnOzvyXtIt3Q9Sa-wVL_fHIwhDg%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: Martin Luther King's Birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1b826851cb&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
My name is Willie Montague and I’m writing to you today, on the observance of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day. I’m a father, pastor and unapologetic Constitutional Conservative and I am here to tell you that if Dr. King were alive today, he would be stunned at what he was seeing.Dr. King’s core beliefs, things like self-government based on absolute truth and moral law, are profoundly Conservative and make up the cornerstone of our political value system. The planks of the modern liberal platform reject these notions but Conservatives respect them. The liberals have tried to take ownership of his legacy, but in actuality, his message was fundamentally conservative!!**IT IS TIME FOR CONSERVATIVES TO LAY CLAIM TO THE LEGACY OF DR. KING** I have written to you before, but let me refresh your memory. A while back, I launched the Frederick Douglass PAC. The aim of the PAC is to help some of the most viable candidates in this nation win their races and to increase engagement of black people in the conservative movement.Like Dr. King and Frederick Douglass, the namesake of this PAC, I believe that judging someone on the color of their skin is inherently unjust and that judgment based on moral character is the only way and that notion is the essence of Conservatism. Modern Liberals don’t want you to know that, though. They want to co-opt the legacies of these two great Black leaders, and others like them, for their own good.**THAT’S WHY IT’S VITAL THAT WE ENGAGE MORE BLACK PEOPLE IN CONSERVATIVE POLITICS**
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c2126b2810&e=fdefed58de)
---
The original civil rights movement told Black people that the principles of human equality and self-determination are God-given and unalienable. It was a message that resonated and that means that at their core, Black people are more conservative than they realize! Our party is trying to unite, not divide like the leftists.But if we are going to have a unified Conservative party, it’s important that we have engagement from Black people. By educating Black voters and getting Black Conservatives elected, we will guarantee majorities in future elections and won’t have to worry about getting Donald Trump re-elected in 2024.The Frederick Douglass PAC hopes to educate, empower and equip candidates with the tools they need to win their races, and part of that strategy is connecting with Black voters who many times don't vote or simply vote Democrat due to having done so their whole lives.**WE WILL NEED YOUR HELP IF WE WANT TO ENGAGE WITH PATRIOTIC BLACK CONSERVATIVES!**
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=da0612fcf6&e=fdefed58de)
---
My name is Willie Montague, I’m a Black man from Orlando Florida. I’m a pastor, activist and a lifelong Republican. I know that with the right amount of investment in Black outreach the GOP could secure MANY more victories across this nation... even in districts that we don’t typically think of.Unfortunately, the GOP has not done much in terms of outreach to the Black community. We need to be funding boots on the ground in **Black neighborhoods** , educating **Black voters** and recruiting future **Black candidates**.I need you to rush in your support to the Frederick Douglass PAC TODAY. With your support, we can organize outreach programs that will help guarantee Republican majorities in the future!
| [INVEST IMMEDIATELY BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=df192afc4b&e=fdefed58de)
---

name: Col. Mike Waltz, me (2)
subject: re: The final fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
I emailed you.

My team emailed you.

Now, I’m reaching out one more time.

**My FIRST mid-month of 2023 is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT, and right now, we’re still not at our goal.**

The clock is ticking, Peter, but our fight isn’t over yet.

We still have a few hours left to make up for lost time and get to our goal, but I’m going to need every member of my A-Team to step up and pull their weight.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In a surprise announcement, trailblazer Senator Debbie Stabenow of Michigan, in Leadership in the Democratic caucus, will be retiring. She was the first woman elected to the Senate from Michigan when she first won the seat in 2000. One of the first names to be mentioned was Elissa Slotkin. Can you help her stand up to what’s going to be a very tough fight for this seat in 2024?
body:
Well, this *was* a safe Senate seat ...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6881206-4310-42d9-af4b-dd95f5e9af20/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|

---
| | | | | Peter, _In a surprise announcement, trailblazer Senator Debbie Stabenow of Michigan, in Leadership in the Democratic caucus, will be retiring. She was the first woman elected to the Senate from Michigan when she first won the seat in 2000._ **_Stabenow was a shoe-in for reelection. But, now that she's stepping aside, it'll be one of the most competitive races Republicans are guaranteed to target._** [**_To continue Stabenow's legacy, protect all we hold dear and elect a great progressive, we must start now. Republicans sure are. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to send the talented, progressive & honest Rep. Slotkin to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94020f86-6b3c-4815-a2cb-f2fb63a62dd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_One of the first names to be mentioned was Elissa Slotkin. Rep. Slotkin's a terrific candidate_** , _one of a group of women with national security credentials elected to the House in swing seats in 2018 (also Reps Sherrill (NJ), Spanberger (VA) and Luria (VA)). As described aptly by the AP, Slotkin is perfect for this race because she is "a Congresswoman...coming off a decisive victory in November in one of the country's most competiitive House districtes." She. Will. Win._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta54fea49-5617-4fc7-b563-eccda39ccf96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Slotkin is also a member of the House Pro-Choice Caucus, voted for an assault weapons ban, fought to keep ACA protections for pre-existing conditions and allow Medicare to bulk negotiate lower drug prices. She also has a background also as a CIA Analyst and in the Defense Department, a perfect, well-rounded resume for a U.S.Senator._ [**_To continue Stabenow's legacy, protect all we hold dear and elect a great progressive, we must start now. Republicans sure are. Can you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to send the talented, progressive & honest Rep. Slotkin to the U.S. Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf8f5809-56a9-4e3d-bcee-512f1af7cbe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting to keep the Senate! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. She was the first woman elected to the Senate from Michigan when she first won the seat in 2000. Stabenow was a shoe-in for reelection. But, now that she's stepping aside, it'll be one of the most competitive races Republicans are guaranteed to target. One of the first names to be mentioned was Elissa Slotkin. Rep. Slotkin's a terrific candidate , one of a group of women with national security credentials elected to the House in swing seats in 2018 (also Reps Sherrill (NJ), Spanberger (VA) and Luria (VA)). As described aptly by the AP, Slotkin is perfect for this race because she is "a Congresswoman...coming off a decisive victory in November in one of the country's most competiitive House districtes." She. Will. Win. | | | | | | | | Slotkin is also a member of the House Pro-Choice Caucus, voted for an assault weapons ban, fought to keep ACA protections for pre-existing conditions and allow Medicare to bulk negotiate lower drug prices. She also has a background also as a CIA Analyst and in the Defense Department, a perfect, well-rounded resume for a U.S.Senator. Thank you for fighting to keep the Senate! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

The 2023 legislative session is underway - hold onto your wallets - and we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Representative Jim Walsh (R - Aberdeen), the fourth-term legislator from Southwest Washington's 19th Legislative District, joined us to discuss several major issues that will define the 2023 legislative session. Rep. Walsh outlined important bills he introduced, including more educational choices for families, prevent skyrocketing property taxes from overwhelming seniors, and prohibit the state from closing churches and other religious institutions during an emergency like Jay Inslee and the Democrats did in 2020. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385379:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r).

**This week 's top story...**
The Seattle Times has run nearly 20 stories about Republican Congressman George Santos (NY) and his admission that he repeatedly lied to voters about his background. By contrast, our state's biggest newspaper has not posted one single story about the numerous lies of Democrat State Representative Clyde Shavers since the paper posted one minor piece back in November. Notably, Shift broke that story six days before the Times bothered to report on it. Bias much, Seattle Times? [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385380:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r).

**This week 's legislative news...**
State Senate Democrats have said they will not listen to any proposal to alter the state's emergency powers laws, because of their arrogance. Republican Senator Lynda Wilson (Vancouver) - a cosponsor of the bill to reform the law - and other members of the Senate's State Government and Elections Committee were informed by Chair Sam Hunt (D - Olympia) that he will not hold a public hearing on SB 5063.

Our readers might remember that Governor Jay Inslee abused our state's emergency powers laws to undemocratically make unchecked dictates for 975 days. And the disgraced Sam Hunt and other Olympia Democrats are just fine with one man making all the decisions for our state, without any oversight at all, as long as that man is a Democrat. [**Read this story and more with our Daily Briefing**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385381:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r).

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385382:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r).

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385383:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r)! | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61385384:sdm9-EDNR:m:1:2610672541:86FBF89E9B646C59FECE29F56A8C3F88:r)

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). The Senate map for 2024 favors Republicans _heavily_. Out of thirty-four Senate seats that will be on the ballot, Democrats are defending twenty-three.
Democrats in red and purple states like Montana, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Ohio will be the main target for the GOP. If they manage to flip any of these seats, we could lose our Senate majority.
To maintain our majority after 2024, we have to start preparing the groundwork to support Michael’s colleagues in these key battleground states now.
**This month, we're facing our first big monthly funding goal of the new Senate term. What we do now will determine how we allocate our funds to support Senate Democrats, protect our progress, our democracy, and our future.**
Michael won his re-election thanks to months of preparation and support from each one of you. With your donation today, we’ll help candidates up and down the ballot win.
**[Team, we’re halfway through January, and our fundraising is nowhere near the pace we need to hit our monthly goal. So please, chip in $10 — or whatever works best for you — by midnight to get back on track for our first monthly goal of the 2024 race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57374713/387716496/1673345946?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM4NTI0MS0zMDk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Twh7x-fzpknnDv1zI45z_UcKv9FSnHgq2IIpaueMYns=)**

clean_body: Friend, you should see this headline from the Washington Post: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | = Hi, you should see this headline from the Washington Post : = | = The Senate map for 2024 favors Republicans heavily. Out of thirty-four Senate seats that will be on the ballot, Democrats are defending twenty-three. Democrats in red and purple states like Montana, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Ohio will be the main target for the GOP. If they manage to flip any of these seats, we could lose our Senate majority. To maintain our majority after 2024, we have to start preparing the groundwork to support Michael’s colleagues in these key battleground states now. This month, we're facing our first big monthly funding goal of the new Senate term. What we do now will determine how we allocate our funds to support Senate Democrats, protect our progress, our democracy, and our future. Michael won his re-election thanks to months of preparation and support from each one of you. With your donation today, we’ll help candidates up and down the ballot win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you for your support, Kelsey H. name: Week in Review (via Stand For America PAC)
subject: How Republicans fought for you this week
body:
Republicans rein in inflation, stand up to China, and more...

| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=5c9ce5a8e3fa45228d4a2e4b10760c7d&_e=zCDCIitxsVwDgB9wySYSKSf0drW6XEYu26UEzAGqpzdWLpAN-EtUJ6NQxzd-h85lB0Hdz4YCkhPQxD6bQ5KRPGMF0uKO9qIO3nKLhWbba6ccfXYeJSWk2SuUfKAWgCVx8PBHpnw9YreuFsxtLDjYcdZC84Hez79fnHOoyINn82MeY-am-PsjN4BveGuNen_CAtJSXhhBum_VImwwr6C-klqO9_ii_KygK_SdnB5NZ8snjlrbZvnCnZbVcVF6FgoQ9LBOu_OfH8Ftp8KambUADw2_o6BxSCaHSOqi_llHeqGOxRIKC8RUYwn4sAytINcfCSjTA0qLuBvHHEAjeuKO33azKdeFtnH_UwllstdDOUhAL6DPrUln2oRrRC_33she)

---
Over the past two years, your support has helped elect freedom-loving conservatives who stand for America. With Republicans back in control of the House and GOP governors leading the way in many states, we’re watching Republicans fulfill their promises and fight for solutions. Here are just a few of the ways Republicans have fought for you this week. ** ****Republicans Tackle Inflation** Republicans went to work immediately to lower Bidenflation by fighting to ensure Biden’s costly executive actions don’t further fuel price increases. With the national debt already at more than $31 trillion, reining in liberals’ reckless spending is essential. **Republicans Stand Up to China** Earlier this week, the GOP led in creating a new panel to investigate China’s threats to the United States. Chaired by Rep. Mike Gallagher (R-WI), the committee will be on the front lines of holding Communist China accountable for its military aggression, intellectual property theft, and human rights abuses—not to mention China’s responsibility for unleashing COVID on the world and flooding our streets with fentanyl. ** ****Republicans Protect Life** Any child born alive should receive the care they need to survive. That’s why this week, House Republicans voted to guarantee that a baby who survives an abortion gets the same care as a baby born prematurely. While caring for a living, breathing human life should never be a partisan issue, Democrats almost unanimously voted against the bill. ** ****Republicans Put Families First in Education** As of 2023, Republican governors lead in 27 states across America, and they’re off to a strong start. In Arkansas, Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders banned Critical Race Theory in public schools as one of her first actions in office. And in Iowa, Gov. Kim Reynolds introduced a historic school choice bill that gives families scholarships to send their kids to the school that works best for them. GOP governors are making it clear that parents and students—not teachers unions—are in charge.**
**

name: Developing Report (via VPP)
subject: Joe Biden’s AMAZING call to top Democrats!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Join our petition to Congress
| **_BREAKING FROM NPR: Biden backs filibuster carveout for abortion rights_** | **|| URGENT PETITION TO CONGRESS ||**
[**We need 15,000 Democratic signatures to help President Biden and pressure the Senate to ABOLISH the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230115_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX) | [**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230115_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX)
---
_We’re thrilled:_ President Biden COMMANDED Senate Democrats to do their job and change the filibuster rules to codify _Roe v. Wade._

[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230115_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX)
Mitch McConnell and Trump’s Justices are panicking, and they’re sprinting to pressure Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to keep the filibuster in place...

That’s why we’re racing to get 15,000 Democratic signatures by midnight tonight. If we fall short, the GOP will totally drown out President Biden – _we can’t let that happen!_

[**Quick: add your name to our petition demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and codify Roe!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230115_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX)
[**SIGN OUR PETITION TO ABOLISH THE FILIBUSTER AND PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/sen-codify-roe/?source=VPP_20230115_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX)
---
Thank you,

_Team VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6027%2E878179%2ELCWFQX).**

name: John Fetterman (sent from my iPhone)
subject: a note for my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
sorry in advance for any typos!!
hey Derek it’s John. forgive my typos – i’m typing this on my iPhone.
As u may know, my team set a mid-month fundraising goal to raise $20,000 by midnight. january has been a tough fundraising month + we need to get back on track.
If i was a different kind of senator, i’d just pick up the phone + call some rich donor.
**_but that’s not how i do things!!!_****__**
my campaign's slogan was "every County, every vote" — but its not just a slogan. it's how i will serve yinz + youse the senate, because no community, no town, no individual should ever feel left behind.
**[I’m in the Senate to fight for real people, and i’m counting on real people to support that work. so i gotta ask you one more time before midnight to step up + make 1 of the donations we need to hit our $20,000 grassroots goal by midnight tonight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230115-1?refcode=em20230115-1-8208&refcode2=8208_434096_gg95Ge&akid=8208%2E434096%2Egg95Ge)**
Thank you thank you thank you. im *so* glad you’re on my team.
❤️❤️❤️John

name: Team Morrisey
subject: Official Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=9a33f81064ee4c48add5d10fc677d644&_e=CvRIpZh4PXU_IjxYP-kvHMXspEhFhCgH-Hvt9S8pmbH_95pJH7PRLypdw78grM1MrJEDIqbSLZRr7GKZuXqsEb9NWsrhY5OmseyeyeVYd6l7SVgRbb0M2UN9JsXRGiEuahJOvt66hWONhQ5M75gmwzhsmVIKbU3uPYpunWk08vTSQTAPFVtHGBk1EhIr4b29V-KotheyyCNqZAc84YrLdKs1hRSUxdFsGP8mmQ78cqpLQzJl9_Q-mKhpXMhWweGMOc1o6o9kKdMLOpNqCKvfbCWy3rVuX6O1J3ukASCfYdaJBMO8k_ILVFZVYELxs8u1ia7BVwYDZ10bj7vTknXL9P10ks9CbXLWErMcmamLRNhclmNVEaXelgq42s3ms6cUYEo1ZNDX8bFnMDSIgcsqGWGCYL6PlAnoakGNyU_ffAo%3D)
---
| |
---
**As we saw in 2022, Attorney General Patrick Morrisey has a proven record of fighting for the people of West Virginia. ** **In 2023, he is going to take that same fighting spirit to take on the Washington swamp.**
---
---
**The victory of SCOTUS ruling on** **West Virginia v. EPA**
---
---
WV v. EPA was one of the biggest cases in 2022 and a huge win for West Virginia. Attorney General Patrick Morrisey scored one of the biggest separation of powers victories against the administrative state in decades.
---
[Read More about The Ruling](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=9a33f81064ee4c48add5d10fc677d644&_e=CvRIpZh4PXU_IjxYP-kvHEJKFuVaB8MOQoiVTFMONv1_5g4Pnlixf-KNBhIk6x9ZnCTLafpLCbLGN9aoxwoEScR9pkhLxWO6pU9Lz2wHOEazv2Gb5oa9AfqGFXyQQ67PafrDOcO-nAYY7n3bSZIDXgBrepTlyQ3ULT3xY5RilBhobxHhjcoum_UH6MQJtYoqwgwRpXUR_kmYxWStIDNqrTGj98Q9pTLLp5us6B6gW8XjexDNbxVVkdkjUaavwz9p3EoZL3wAXz1HrQhEmTcKyTEc82joG5B2POCpi1GLZiVAw-5QwoGbEARIuxxEd2YF)
---
---
**Negotiations Surrounding the Opioid Crisis**
---
---
No state in the nation has been more aggressive and successful in holding entities accountable. The state of West Virginia and Attorney General Patrick Morrisey made history when they negotiated the **_HIGHEST_** per capita settlements against opioid companies in the nation.
---
[About the Settlement](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=9a33f81064ee4c48add5d10fc677d644&_e=CvRIpZh4PXU_IjxYP-kvHARn4q88t5GhJdToURSz-4tfgRFsUDcy0uHNd1o8sqS6UEmtyL82ge2RN2udyMZiAeXUtOgUemY1oaaSv3ct5SRgjSZmVMh_D_NcmZGDoU5J09WJKo3a4VRF1jORg6JO5dzhO6nxOvLupFDdsBqw-1hU4NWo3k_syZ8TlhFSQfeBwxm8GwGzjJf6UjheDA55lxhIgzY7cx-f9ckofgI2Kv6B-1p19Tf2Y5kLC293MGtW4naDHCqVg8iIXkbN8LE3k2deo7fLc35N4m6YIlPct0519nKHFQ7py6mL0tQXA1YpTmhn-Cd2RYafUyRdEOTufA%3D%3D)
---
| |
---
**A victory in the ruling of a WV Supreme Court case allowing the reactivation of Hope Scholarships**
---
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey had a major victory in 2022 by winning the WV Supreme Court case allowing for the reactivation of the Hope Scholarship along with one of the broadest school choice programs in the nation.
---
[Read About the Ruling](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=9a33f81064ee4c48add5d10fc677d644&_e=CvRIpZh4PXU_IjxYP-kvHE0udKwvJMhJKZxBbdUw8KTSHhBLYXPHqmMDinvmjnhl8Hy5e_14zlChR2KzFFc1_N_q3yULYjHw7NzSgtk4nfVl9g0u--KQ8OucKvKfHWuaw1vK5nIdqeD0cVsvnBYvb2hc3JzFs7-EyeF9Sjcc9pdtl6CMBkcf9Dw8F8Kj73RFSUMi1lM2G0hZ5tk-oOSjA8pDT3ZRzNMSGRch4OpOt8fv9R1EXapLvzgbpj-3q6yzU9szJXit2vrw_qi5jti2LVU36Zp1TTTEoR41DsTzIHMLmZmlChlGaVeX1nC8tBhEDz7syDUspRKP5H4aHknRdcnt9LCiw6MTmy8ZfWffHegCukor82lCTAvuHnlTdNJU)
---
---
**Committed to West Virginians**
---
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is dedicated to the state of West Virginia and its people. This year, he spent countless hours traveling the state, hearing from everyday West Virginians about their businesses, issues and triumphs.
---

In 2023, he is going to take that same fighting spirit to take on the Washington swamp. The victory of SCOTUS ruling on West Virginia v. EPA WV v. EPA was one of the biggest cases in 2022 and a huge win for West Virginia. Attorney General Patrick Morrisey scored one of the biggest separation of powers victories against the administrative state in decades. Negotiations Surrounding the Opioid Crisis No state in the nation has been more aggressive and successful in holding entities accountable. The state of West Virginia and Attorney General Patrick Morrisey made history when they negotiated the HIGHEST per capita settlements against opioid companies in the nation. | | A victory in the ruling of a WV Supreme Court case allowing the reactivation of Hope Scholarships Attorney General Patrick Morrisey had a major victory in 2022 by winning the WV Supreme Court case allowing for the reactivation of the Hope Scholarship along with one of the broadest school choice programs in the nation. Committed to West Virginians Attorney General Patrick Morrisey is dedicated to the state of West Virginia and its people. # [Naming names to hold feet to the fire](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=96786006&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTY3ODYwMDYsImlhdCI6MTY3MzgxMTk5NCwiZXhwIjoxNjc2NDAzOTk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.0XaorNIwv2nNhy23l2Mi6yX1Z5vLjjCuBzxLdd70kA0)
### My latest writing prompted a wide-ranging discussion with Katie Halper & Aaron Mate
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/74545d96-7ca0-4236-964f-d95f8466ce68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Jan 15| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74545d96-7ca0-4236-964f-d95f8466ce68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=96786006&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTY3ODYwMDYsInJlYWN0aW9uIjoi4p2kIiwiaWF0IjoxNjczODExOTk0LCJleHAiOjE2NzY0MDM5OTQsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0xMDE4NTk3Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.iOS5z_yx4j63w-9MAQK8SqxStL3-Ke1y-7X21DmzFHo&utm_medium=email)

---
Earlier this month, I wrote about the transition in the House and [what progressives could learn](https://substack.com/redirect/5d18f13c-0e8e-4a44-a127-16000058d125?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from populists in the GOP who have come to wield greater influence as a result of demonstrating greater assertiveness against their party's corporate leadership. That article prompted an invitation last week from pundit & comedienne Katie Halper to rejoin Useful Idiots, a weekly program [launched](https://substack.com/redirect/51246a5a-b52e-4045-a470-0405254fab14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2019 by Rolling Stone to explore "politics, culture, and the news media."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/68c7b713-aeae-49ef-bf46-3c2a2bd7e0af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I was grateful for the opportunity to join Katie and her former co-host Matt Taibbi in [November 2019](https://substack.com/redirect/ece63bf5-34ee-4820-a63a-7185016821e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to discuss my campaign for Congress responding to the failure of Democrats to contain a fascist President, in [June 2020](https://substack.com/redirect/89c62a74-7850-4b51-8902-bbfd20a60ced?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to discuss the movement for Black lives and the failure of Democrats to represent it, and again in [September 2020](https://substack.com/redirect/a1b352f1-3e1d-4fb5-aead-c4538bf0ef0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to defend myself against false accusations orchestrated by racist Democrats loyal to Pelosi. This was my first time joining Katie with her new co-host, journalist [Aaron Mate](https://substack.com/redirect/75fd9eec-a2a0-4a15-91ae-a36bf4803642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Our [latest interview](https://substack.com/redirect/68c7b713-aeae-49ef-bf46-3c2a2bd7e0af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) started by addressing the themes in [my latest writing](https://substack.com/redirect/5d18f13c-0e8e-4a44-a127-16000058d125?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) exploring potential lessons for populists in the Democratic party demonstrated by those in the GOP.
To my grateful surprise, our discussion expanded to also include some other topics I've covered in previous articles. One was the mounting [racism plaguing San Francisco](https://substack.com/redirect/7c6f353c-3a3e-4a61-b9f5-19d2f1f5b0e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) despite its (increasingly undeserved) "progressive" reputation, made painfully visible online through a recent viral demonstration of unapologetic entitlement by a sadly typical San Franciscan.
[Shahid Buttar (find me on Substack) @ShahidForChangeToo many San Franciscans ignore the disdain & racism that flourish in our city. Electing Black figureheads does nothing to address them. This video makes visible an attitude towards poverty that has grown sadly pervasive. Don Salmon @dijoniThis man should be arrested. This is what white supremacist do abuse, homeless, Black people, anti-blackness in San Francisco. Nancy Pelosi Districk. You got a black woman who is the mayor. https://t.co/pGgLDGPuOc](https://substack.com/redirect/9f9ce9cd-b286-46a8-bf54-3bcc0415a0fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[11:56 PM ∙ Jan 10, 2023
* * *
87Likes13Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/9f9ce9cd-b286-46a8-bf54-3bcc0415a0fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Another theme that Aaron introduced involved [patterns among journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/8a63acc6-1482-46d3-828f-4541351d5025?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who defer to establishment corruption while amplifying fraudulent ad hominem attacks on voices who challenge it. It's a topic of which I have grown weary, but as long as it persists, it inflects literally every other issue that may come up for public discussion, so I'm glad that Aaron invited me to share my thoughts.
That discussion about the erosion of journalism--with deference to the establishment and character assassinations targeting its critics serving as opposite sides of a coin--led to a broader conversation about its implications for government. We discussed a [sad relationship between governance and political theater](https://substack.com/redirect/6616e228-aa59-43f4-80a1-a16704ca4ec2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that is too often allowed to supplant it, and I named two beneficiaries of the institutional racism widely embraced among San Francisco Democrats who currently serve on our city's Board of Supervisors: Dean Preston and new Board President Aaron Peskin.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a003d2e5-02a5-4d2a-94a6-0a9d2b711373?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My discussion with Katie & Aaron also offered a chance to preview some themes of a few upcoming articles. One will explore troubling ethics violations and reported racism in the office of Oakland's new Mayor, Sheng Thao. Her record--exposed by Black journalists and grassroots activists in Oakland--has been widely suppressed by local journalists who appear to be more committed to a feel-good narrative than either public accountability, their own profession's ethics, or racial justice.
Another will revisit the 2020 "civic lynching" [revealed](https://substack.com/redirect/4da8a594-8d42-4e83-a240-a85c91b8898a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the San Francisco Bayview in July 2021 to finally expose its various architects, including elected officials, Democratic operatives on both sides of the bay, public relations executives, and journalists from both corporate news outlets and independent outlets whose continuing impunity has enabled this pattern to repeat itself.
Many of these figures have gone on to build careers based on recurring racist accusations punching down and left at grassroots activists who observe their corruption. Having witnessed the continuing failures of journalists from San Francisco to Washington, DC to hold power accountable, I'm writing [this continuing series](https://substack.com/redirect/7c6f353c-3a3e-4a61-b9f5-19d2f1f5b0e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to offer the transparency they have unfortunately resigned.
Feel free to share [video of our discussion](https://substack.com/redirect/68c7b713-aeae-49ef-bf46-3c2a2bd7e0af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with friends, especially any who get their news from online videos or may be less inclined to read the analysis that prompted it.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=96786006&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTY3ODYwMDYsImlhdCI6MTY3MzgxMTk5NCwiZXhwIjoxNjc2NDAzOTk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.0XaorNIwv2nNhy23l2Mi6yX1Z5vLjjCuBzxLdd70kA0)
Paid subscribers can access below a collection of articles I've written exploring the radical legacy of Dr. Martin Luther, King, Jr. I'll distribute another post tomorrow offering contemporary context for this year's commemoration. In the meantime, these can offer a primer on one of our nation's most prolific and widely celebrated--yet, ironically, [still widely unappreciated](https://substack.com/redirect/0067b38a-5722-4c27-a0e5-8c6ea9489786?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and unrecognized--voices.
I hope you have a chance this weekend to share the radical legacy of our nation's most celebrated justice hero. #ReclaimMLK!...

Having witnessed the continuing failures of journalists from San Francisco to Washington, DC to hold power accountable, I'm writing to offer the transparency they have unfortunately resigned. Feel free to share with friends, especially any who get their news from online videos or may be less inclined to read the analysis that prompted it. Paid subscribers can access below a collection of articles I've written exploring the radical legacy of Dr. Martin Luther, King, Jr. I'll distribute another post tomorrow offering contemporary context for this year's commemoration. In the meantime, these can offer a primer on one of our nation's most prolific and widely celebrated--yet, ironically, and unrecognized--voices. I hope you have a chance this weekend to share the radical legacy of our nation's most celebrated justice hero. #ReclaimMLK!... subject: The GOP is targeting Tammy

body:

#
Peter, it’s only a matter of time before Republicans start up their campaigns against Tammy. Already this week, the National Republican Senatorial Committee launched attack ads against some of Tammy’s in-cycle colleagues, and it won’t be long until they start going after Tammy too. Here are three reasons why the GOP has a target on Tammy’s seat so early in the cycle:
1. Wisconsin races are won and lost by **close margins**. In the past two election cycles, President Joe Biden won the state by just 0.6% in 2020 and Republican Senator Ron Johnson won his re-election campaign by 1% last November.

2. However, last time Tammy was on the ballot, she won by _double digits_ — so **Republicans know they need a head start** if they’re going to beat her this time around.

3. With a narrow Senate majority, Mitch McConnell and Republicans only need to **flip two seats** to reclaim the gavel — and it could all come down to our race in Wisconsin.

We know that it’s only a matter of time before GOP super PACs start their smear campaigns against Tammy, which is why we’re preparing now for any attacks they throw our way. **By pitching in today, you’re helping us build up our defenses and get us ready for the onslaught of Republican spending coming our way. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Wall Street's political power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Wall Street has never been my biggest fan.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv)
Derek,
**Wall Street has never been my biggest fan.**
When I was appointed California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks following the 2008 mortgage crisis, I held their feet to the fire. I made sure they paid California families the billions our settlement determined they were entitled to.
In the House, I’ve introduced legislation to hold Wall Street accountable for cheating Californians. I’ve also confronted corporate executives directly in congressional hearings. Those whiteboard moments helped lead to real change—like a new law I wrote that’s cracking down on Big Pharma’s price gouging.
**Now I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate, and the Big Banks will spend money attacking me.**
This campaign will only be possible because of grassroots supporters: **[Can you become a Founding Donor by making a $15 donation today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15242?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F&t=2&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15243?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F-el&t=3&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15244?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15245?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15246?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15247?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15242?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F&t=8&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv)

Thanks for being a part of Team Porter!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF15_1_WAL_20230115_V1_F&t=9&refcode2=15926_3422442_Duhxrv&akid=15926%2E3422442%2EDuhxrv)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, We reached out to you once. We reached out to you twice. Now, I’m asking for a final time. Peter, I’m busy working in Washington to secure our conservative future, but this is so important I had to take a few moments to reach out to you. We can’t afford to start this year off on the wrong foot. If we miss our goal so early on, how are we going to be able to catch up for 2024? We only have one chance, Peter. Don’t let us down. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

| | Peter, as we’re sure you’ve heard by now, **Kevin McCarthy was forced to make major concessions to MAGA extremists like Matt Gaetz and Lauren Boebert** in his extremely long and drawn-out bid for Speaker of the House. Here are some of the most concerning ones:
| __MCCARTHY’S CONCESSIONS:__
---
* Any lawmaker from either party will be able to force a vote on removing the Speaker of the House (yes, ANY lawmaker).
* MAGA Republicans are expected to receive highly-coveted committee assignments.
* The debt ceiling can’t be raised, meaning we’ll likely see an attempt to reduce spending on _Social Security and Medicare._
* A new subcommittee under the House Judiciary Committee will be established and will have access to any information shared with the House Intelligence Committee, chaired by none other than Jim Jordan.

**_And those are just the ones we know about._

There’s no telling what the implications of McCarthy’s concessions could be, but right now, it’s not looking good, Peter. Are you as worried as we are that the concessions Kevin McCarthy made to secure victory could pose a danger to our democracy? [Let us know by taking our survey:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl_H-jDL0qcq9i4LNKO4vYtl5RRLV0MoLLKTNZ3QVIVkFZCdLOzMkuI4QzEfM2BdeA4E5m0aA3RtmgSNpYPv9ufVJl4UEzYQb1YXmprD9J0ojqbbq_gkEWBcAhFq1CPBjGKgF3Up_D7_jXZLPBg62oJE6i2jCj0_W2NPydGwVaCBDWZjXpRgGlJoyYtrYSnjRMT6asgCkBzZ1OWqcNEhze7vRnuddidWgedF3FlbvUi1XvXkhJ3dU_etlQaHTZTbz5u55AORlV7lskmLzTs-m1r/3sv/VDr6w30VSOSVCYUV-EDDGQ/h1/tSbmzGY7xKJXlOu996X1wYBPzkNQnv0WZ23vEL0SN40)**

**So please -- before our midnight deadline, join the team that's fighting for reproductive rights, voting rights, and working families across the country.**

name: America First War Room
subject: If looks could kill! Watch his fury when CNN keeps asking Chuck Schumer actual hard questions

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Sunday afternoon's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

name: Obama Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: President Barack Obama’s important message
body:
President Obama is highlighting the crucial work of state legislatures: | | |
---
| | **President Obama is highlighting the crucial work of state legislatures:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PPTerVVPnuOZ3goCMCldyZhiV12oZLPw4hiql2ljw1JGQggt13JCNGDTk3rIuL6MESkd_TIbyg0iPK1cOxl0FltwjfLHjbzslwVkNkOurSPuiOkpwa_Fr_MzHhG3FfoAZSqv0-A-6YwbfCcBXJmI8Jc86mr0GIAerORxQBhL2Mi-e8PccCYGdJXV61IwQBUaAJqQbNJdDKlaaN7rnQ90QMmoEPV1OAm7J6bYdDa7fPvKBrLptPs7MGESU_eUCIaVNUYMA6RbN-26JLbNAXf1wZ21aKXKwgloS0MQmyEpa7lDsYTT2AjJ4Y8z5Rfh13Akuqmz2axDR8wkt_K_nYJWcQeotEdLtKQZw4fQE-cwouxD/3sv/sUCzTZ3ITq2Ohc9aBTODwA/h0/MXCyCh4U6C1TkVX2PJAEn1xRK7hG62HbmoaY0WznSdU) He’s so right: We know it can be easy to tune out politics and wait for the next election in November, but the reality is special elections are already on the books in competitive battleground states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. In both these states, winning these special elections would provide a HUGE boost to Democratic power and could allow Democrats in these states to protect abortion access, our democracy, and so much more. State legislators pass legislation that has a major impact on Americans’ day-to-day lives. **Abortion access, voting rights, paid family leave, and more can all be decided at the state level.** **And, unlike other levels of the ballot, state legislative elections happen year-round, year after year.** That’s why it’s critical to have the continued support of grassroots Democrats like you on our side. That support helps us make early investments in campaigns like organizing on the ground, running digital ads, and more. [We need your support. Can you chip in $7 right now to help elect state Democrats across the country that’ll pass progressive legislation? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PPTerVVPnuOZ3goCMCldyZhiV12oZLPw4hiql2ljw1JGQggt13JCNGDTk3rIuL6MESkd_TIbyg0iPK1cOxl0FltwjfLHjbzslwVkNkOurSPuiOkpwa_Fr_MzHhG3FfoAZUArp-Wgp3iTMYE_Oncs83oTfqGuu0lK0dk2hoM0gUUWdtGADEIl1YRUQj8wRy-YQK6UXNqs-qpvHvw4mAdsAoaIBkiq3GBvT0rkuJ_5-sjnfjITCuVkDoDvgpzOiiOCBFTBw1KPsL2Sby6JiWk_Kg1zaNyt9v7PP8xcSV9T28aN4uEYkJYXCfaI0qITyZ5ud8wPEJ5fq42KyQox-QqvltiOw1piD8pNhLVs6PVLbmF4kMpFcI0eDWR9dslCAcUYDg/3sv/sUCzTZ3ITq2Ohc9aBTODwA/h1/7z1zGP0mS8FleghAFKspHIqJBHz39HDYfNTgdNhBozE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: President Obama is highlighting the crucial work of state legislatures: | | | | | President Obama is highlighting the crucial work of state legislatures: He’s so right: We know it can be easy to tune out politics and wait for the next election in November, but the reality is special elections are already on the books in competitive battleground states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire. In both these states, winning these special elections would provide a HUGE boost to Democratic power and could allow Democrats in these states to protect abortion access, our democracy, and so much more. State legislators pass legislation that has a major impact on Americans’ day-to-day lives. Abortion access, voting rights, paid family leave, and more can all be decided at the state level. And, unlike other levels of the ballot, state legislative elections happen year-round, year after year. That’s why it’s critical to have the continued support of grassroots Democrats like you on our side. That support helps us make early investments in campaigns like organizing on the ground, running digital ads, and more. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
---
| | We are just two weeks into 2023 and the NRCC is already gearing up for 2024. That means it is critical we start laying the groundwork and start doing everything in our power to protect our bipartisan progress and NJ-5 from extremists.

In order to protect our Jersey Values, and defend my seat, we’re going to need all hands on deck. [_Can I count on you to help us start the new year strong by contributing $10? Your donation will help kickstart our 2024 election fund!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57364433/387708863/1426878943?amount=10&refcode2=6b9ec7d4-1795-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=JG_EM_FR_30DO_20230115_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllYzdkNC0xNzk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYY7d8gT-lQ-BMo3z9J0v0A8YgHcMEjc0wsb8kZBBLo=)

You can donate using this link: [_https://go.josh4congress.com/a/january2023_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57364435/387708867/1426878943?amount=10&refcode2=6b9ec7d4-1795-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=JG_EM_FR_30DO_20230115_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllYzdkNC0xNzk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYY7d8gT-lQ-BMo3z9J0v0A8YgHcMEjc0wsb8kZBBLo=)

2024 may seem like a ways away, but with the NRCC desperate to expand its slim majority, and unseat Frontline candidates like myself, **it’s crucial we remain on top of our finances and do everything we can to prove our strength.**

[_So, can I count on you to chip in $10, and help ensure we are starting 2023 in the strongest place possible?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57364436/387708870/1426878943?amount=10&refcode2=6b9ec7d4-1795-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&refcode=JG_EM_FR_30DO_20230115_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjllYzdkNC0xNzk1LWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WYY7d8gT-lQ-BMo3z9J0v0A8YgHcMEjc0wsb8kZBBLo=)

Thank you for everything,

Josh

clean_body: | | We are just two weeks into 2023 and the NRCC is already gearing up for 2024. That means it is critical we start laying the groundwork and start doing everything in our power to protect our bipartisan progress and NJ-5 from extremists. In order to protect our Jersey Values, and defend my seat, we’re going to need all hands on deck. = You can donate using this link: = 2024 may seem like a ways away, but with the NRCC desperate to expand its slim majority, and unseat Frontline candidates like myself, it’s crucial we remain on top of our finances and do everything we can to prove our strength. = Thank you for everything, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values.
