subject: $8,000 before midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi, Peter.

It’s a Sunday, so I’ll try to keep this short and get right to the point.

Our January fundraising has been slower than we expected and in order to
make up for it, we need to reach $8,000 raised through our email program
before midnight tonight — the midpoint of the month.

We’re ready to find the next progressive fighters to run for Congress,
whether they’re a nurse, middle school principal, bartender, or activist,
as long as they’re a working-class champion. We know you’re ready too.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124882?refcode=em20230115-27067&t=1001&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe ]We need your support to reach this $8,000 fundraising goal before
midnight tonight to find the next slate of progressive fighters. Will you
donate $3 right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124882?refcode=em20230115-27067&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for being with us. Whether you can afford to donate
today or not, I’m still thankful for your support.

More soon,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230115-27067-footer&t=1023&refcode2=27067_1203867_zFqGEe&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=27067%2E1203867%2EzFqGEe

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| Derek -- We want to introduce you to **EVERY STATE**!

The strategy of investing valuable resources in traditional swing states every election cycle is archaic and leads to an ineffective Congress that favors Extremists elected in non-competitive races.

Our unique 50-state strategy will enable Democrats to finally be competitive in districts and states that have long been conceded to Extremist Republicans due to lack of funding and effective messaging. Extremism jeopardizes Marriage Equality, Women's Rights, and even Our Democracy. Now that Kevin McCarthy has the Speakers Gavel, he will give away power to **Extremists who supported January 6th like Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, Jim Jordan, and Marjorie Taylor Greene.**

name: Team WFP
subject: Sign the Petition: George Santos Needs to Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
After countless lies and likely campaign finance violations, the new Congressperson in NY-3 must be stopped from inflicting more harm on the people of New York and across the country. | | | Peter, **George Santos needs to resign.** After countless lies and likely campaign finance violations, the new Congressperson in NY-3 must be stopped from inflicting more harm on the people of New York and across the country. **[Sign the petition to demand his resignation now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ4sEfwZeaQlGh2gN-zACE3tm8h54OvjF1PwOjKiqEBjYeRX_0W1G1WXrN82Yfl1WkrkWpLboGJKZwGtyG9i9JX6LrGFG_RHfmBDjUehwS883E8mfT3DWl8T4y3q1B3vd_DpbmDnudmLZTPPBq7wA7vO0a2_vunAOqRlET-pWFwRUimsK_BP7f2aOjlpcJo48Q6TQjL6BBYjhSE6vNj3dxDx4-ej2toMyZuPaCVA6DVGxTPkPDKvLmUSL1Nqis-F3ClW-UzPHhip0aeN-nOt7u45ySi64HN__qvH2e7ZTyM0Rg/3sv/pskqr0ORQI-UiHRtXjsh0w/h0/gw4WdCvjaINAVUvm_LJEBs-CRu_gEWlSs-9sb_oFyEI)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ4sEfwZeaQlGh2gN-zACE3tm8h54OvjF1PwOjKiqEBjYeRX_0W1G1WXrN82Yfl1WkrkWpLboGJKZwGtyG9i9JX6LrGFG_RHfmBDjUehwS883DjWwMKP8e3ziAwyLxDSBko_FYLUBwwi7rYBFic5QiLr4q4vlWvOhmvciERJrwx1x1YnQmneZkBivg4lr7qRyvISy3VWXVwnXJWh2NPhl7x3_QGOdwmyiQUrZK0SzFUpAw7bHSoKv8Fh5cfypjxrwyExkVkydGQ5yPIL7q6501jm_MvN9IrWU0YafcewKymmNA/3sv/pskqr0ORQI-UiHRtXjsh0w/h1/7gW62_3Ow723jwfKNOgu8PDp90B34g5svxlMCS8C9Fg)** **George Santos was sworn in earlier this month with what may be the most unique resume in Congress.** His resume includes attendance at a prestigious high school, and a graduation in the top 1% at Baruch College — where, according to him, he was also part of the championship volleyball team. His resume includes highly-successful stints at Goldman Sachs and Citigroup, which might be one way of explaining how he was able to loan his own campaign $700,000. His resume that he presented to voters included claims that his grandparents fled the Holocaust, that he lost his mother in the terrorist attacks on September 11th, and that he had multiple employees who died in the Pulse nightclub shooting in 2016. **His resume is also 100% made up.** Despite these revelations and investigations into him by Nassau County, federal prosecutors, and even law enforcement in Brazil, Santos still refuses to resign his seat. As ridiculous as Santos’s story is — and it really does just get worse — there’s more at stake here than having one more Republican liar in Congress. With such a tight margin in the House, Republicans are desperate for every last vote, even from a complete fraud like Santos, to try and pass their cruel policies targeting working people. And let’s be clear: Santos won his seat not just by lying to voters about his biography and resume, but also by lying and fear mongering about the “Radical Left” and a crime wave that does not exist. **His only goal was to seize as much power as he could for himself, and for his wealthy friends, at the expense of everyone else.** This week, Santos said that he would resign if 142,000 people called for him to step down. Let’s call his bluff. **[We’re asking you to sign our petition now to call for Santos’s resignation, to be one of those 142,000, and to get the people of NY-03 another shot at the representation they clean_body: After countless lies and likely campaign finance violations, the new Congressperson in NY-3 must be stopped from inflicting more harm on the people of New York and across the country. | | | Peter, George Santos needs to resign. After countless lies and likely campaign finance violations, the new Congressperson in NY-3 must be stopped from inflicting more harm on the people of New York and across the country. George Santos was sworn in earlier this month with what may be the most unique resume in Congress. His resume includes attendance at a prestigious high school, and a graduation in the top 1% at Baruch College — where, according to him, he was also part of the championship volleyball team. His resume includes highly-successful stints at Goldman Sachs and Citigroup, which might be one way of explaining how he was able to loan his own campaign $700,000. His resume that he presented to voters included claims that his grandparents fled the Holocaust, that he lost his mother in the terrorist attacks on September 11th, and that he had multiple employees who died in the Pulse nightclub shooting in 2016. His resume is also 100% made up. Despite these revelations and investigations into him by Nassau County, federal prosecutors, and even law enforcement in Brazil, Santos still refuses to resign his seat. As ridiculous as Santos’s story is — and it really does just get worse — there’s more at stake here than having one more Republican liar in Congress. With such a tight margin in the House, Republicans are desperate for every last vote, even from a complete fraud like Santos, to try and pass their cruel policies targeting working people. And let’s be clear: Santos won his seat not just by lying to voters about his biography and resume, but also by lying and fear mongering about the “Radical Left” and a crime wave that does not exist. His only goal was to seize as much power as he could for himself, and for his wealthy friends, at the expense of everyone else. This week, Santos said that he would resign if 142,000 people called for him to step down. Let’s call his bluff. Along with a coalition of organizations demanding better for New York, we’re going to make our voices heard, because we deserve honest, ethical representation — and leaders in Congress who will fight for us. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Court Watch (via NDRC)
subject: an ultra-conservative court could be coming to a state near you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
far-right megadonors are working behind the scenes to reshape our country’s judiciary
|
---

| **For years, Republicans stacked courts with conservative justices who they believed would advance their anti-democratic agenda of eliminating reproductive freedom and voting rights protections._Those efforts are paying off._

Now, far-right megadonors are working behind the scenes to repeat that strategy in states across the country – and an upcoming Supreme Court race in Wisconsin is their next target.

[_Will you donate now to support the NDRC’s efforts to combat this right-wing plan to reshape our nation’s judiciary, and all of our work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57368957/387712236/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=20230115.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4ZTllNWZhLTFmOTUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QAD1wlzytIOspgHwWpytmb6gUdyer-tFPa0p6DX6wbo=)**
---
Team, the Supreme Court’s recent decisions gutting the Voting Rights Act and overturning _Roe v. Wade_ didn’t happen overnight. Instead, they were the result of a decades-long effort by conservative activists to consolidate power in federal courts. **_And they’re just getting started._**

With national protections for voting rights and abortion rights decimated, it’s now up to individual states to secure these freedoms – that’s why the far-right is turning their attention to state courts.
**“The Far Right is pursuing an audacious effort to capture America’s courts. Fueled by $250 million in secret ‘dark money’ contributions, they seek to enact a radical social and economic agenda they could never achieve legislatively.”**

**– The American Constitution Society**
[Help combat the GOP’s dark-money agenda: Rush a donation to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57368958/387712237/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=20230115.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4ZTllNWZhLTFmOTUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QAD1wlzytIOspgHwWpytmb6gUdyer-tFPa0p6DX6wbo=)
---
If the GOP’s plan succeeds, we could see the same kind of ideological extremism in courts all across the country. That could hinder states’ efforts to protect abortion rights, address gun violence, take action on climate change, and more.

[**_Republicans are hoping their plot to influence state court races like the Wisconsin Supreme Court will go undetected – but the NDRC is committed to combating these kinds of anti-democratic tactics. Will you rush a donation now to support the NDRC’s work across the country to help elect officials who will defend fair maps and a strong democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57368959/387712239/-1059731020?amount=30&refcode=20230115.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4ZTllNWZhLTFmOTUtZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QAD1wlzytIOspgHwWpytmb6gUdyer-tFPa0p6DX6wbo=)

clean_body: far-right megadonors are working behind the scenes to reshape our country’s judiciary | | For years, Republicans stacked courts with conservative justices who they believed would advance their anti-democratic agenda of eliminating reproductive freedom and voting rights protections.Those efforts are paying off. Now, far-right megadonors are working behind the scenes to repeat that strategy in states across the country – and an upcoming Supreme Court race in Wisconsin is their next target. = Team, the Supreme Court’s recent decisions gutting the Voting Rights Act and overturning Roe v. Wade didn’t happen overnight. Instead, they were the result of a decades-long effort by conservative activists to consolidate power in federal courts. And they’re just getting started. With national protections for voting rights and abortion rights decimated, it’s now up to individual states to secure these freedoms – that’s why the far-right is turning their attention to state courts. “The Far Right is pursuing an audacious effort to capture America’s courts. Fueled by $250 million in secret ‘dark money’ contributions, they seek to enact a radical social and economic agenda they could never achieve legislatively.” – The American Constitution Society = If the GOP’s plan succeeds, we could see the same kind of ideological extremism in courts all across the country. subject: (𝐫𝐞: Arizona) we’re running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
If we can flip this seat, we’ll expand our Senate majority
| **There are three things you need to know about the Arizona Senate race before tonight's make-or-break deadline:**

**ONE:** Sen. Sinema's support is sinking after abandoning the Democratic Party: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38494?t=6&akid=6033%2E878179%2EraDbln) | [$15,000 MID-MONTH GOAL: RUSH $7 NOW TO FLIP THIS SEAT AND EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38494?t=7&akid=6033%2E878179%2EraDbln)
---
**TWO:** So we're seizing the moment to flip this seat and expand our slim Senate majority!

**THREE:** _We're still $2,941 short of our critical goal_ to replace Sinema with a good Democrat. If we don't catch up, _we'll lose the momentum we need to win in 2024._
[**Chip in $7 before our crucial deadline TONIGHT fund our work to expand our Senate majority >>**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/38494?t=8&akid=6033%2E878179%2EraDbln)
**GOAL: $15,000 | LEFT TO RAISE: $2,941 | DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6033%2E878179%2EraDbln). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6033%2E878179%2EraDbln).**

subject: Listen to Walter’s Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children |
body:
For students like Walter, we can’t afford to give up on this fight| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this **[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_t=dUiE1JEn0DN93Rxw8tgLeAxq9r2Nj3fKXMLjkdeyEv5KN3lvqJALapPHqMBAPa8NSyu2hd89Loc39eJkIT8eSf-81qPQCsXNZT3JiWDiTrQ%3D)**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14AMvg_qPbWkq2nemrOR9lzxekzJRS5K-JDudbqGkBfnua2ub4rRsjTb_TqmK6vIawqAUzISrxYnwPlktCZ8hIah43xtxA805IQY7voQpWCrwmdhulVDuwgZrnvvuXAFA2xz7nhZOJtlcvzf9i6fRlDA)
---
Hi Peter, this is Elizabeth BeShears, and I help represent the American Federation for Children.
Our organization believes school choice should be available to ALL, regardless of skin color, background, or zip code, so students like **Walter Blanks** can attend a school that works for **_him_**.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14BPRUrwA0ZoxYIIfRTLU5Oup4ttj3Gg0oiN6vqDoLmvWGVC0rmqymMldj0Pw9nRKH1LWY4TruXJ0TIEZPYkOuV21LsILQvHm9C71yrjlC5ZLe0u3nF0m4E5ff_c3R3k5AeuiYq8qi0MDChe5ck84AE0)
---
| | [**WATCH ‘WALTER’S DREAM’ NOW >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14DwfTTme2PSepd_B4e0GJEe0DAI-Czr82Vt2IhMBMdbUkBCrKMa4Me_he8UAlCpYE2i7CuYYqeB5XvZakhaOvFTE6ak89ckDd1vDAU-zH-jR2f15EYzzs5LoTtVyICmhDSqKsA4qzPofRJaEMv8sKBA)
---
As a public school student, Walter felt like **_an exile in his own land_** , words he drew from the great Reverend Martin Luther King Jr’s “I Have A Dream” speech. [**> > Listen to Walter discuss education freedom for ALL >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14AQihpWUu1LEF66jg0vAJIWBxudsNsE4QEJTyL3_qccoxPjjR5YVcRReV7MsbApoSN5Lj22CHIfffyb79OdGcN0CnajPNjjIb33w96gvR-dIMuQTuB1fuZJKybbHHiResIx06qHI03WuvJjZyHhG6QC) Peter, did you know _**72%**_**of Americans now support school choice** after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child? At the American Federation for Children, we’re leading the movement to enact school choice programs in _every_ state. **We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. And 72% of Americans agree.**
---
[**I AGREE, I’M IN THE 72%: CHIP IN >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14Cag65BCeF0CNnw9u5LfaI4SSNVvxxak3OaDSCc2YDfQeaBrM14WnioTERHjSi7KYeNsNLgHx91KjJX0q6xOWtl_ggtkqzInynT4PHdPmAFdYzcPXjcWiJmwjGH8cCfWeKLNnp3wEnig7txyxTtwS0h)
---
Peter, our organization is on the front lines of the school choice fight so students like Walter have a say in the education they deserve. **In just the past few years, we’ve seen HUGE results.** After COVID, school choice is now supported by **72%** of Americans. Our organization has rallied grassroots choice activists across the countryOver **700K** students are now in school choice programs nationwide Now, we’re gearing up to take the next leap and deliver school choice wins in EVERY STATE in America. **That’s why we need your support –** school choice opponents are working overtime to undo the hard work we’ve already accomplished. **For students like Walter, we can’t afford to give up on this fight. **
We’re asking you to join the fight for students, parents, and choice by making an [**initial donation**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14B4zNqpd2PCQ89C2YaRHRYITvAm2ElhjU19Qo8uu_ZdKqdwJHa06egDc3xmxeKgTv2dAr3Sth87ZaWwrLX6vYGawKgL2ZWNe1Jik3A7E3yz7eje9xuGcG7bFsRgOUZV5Hm3EN0J7DDEp6mpLwZxf6ZC) today.**[Peter, are you a part of the 72% willing to fight for school choice?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7f42fbcd40174b5eaee5dd5188f2d77e&_e=RHxjOcs-uL4T8BfbChxM1jjOLKfO5kXqgqQcIONCrGEWknDmawDXn8_TgKgWIyQ8O8QZn2KXurP_yPmU5UaXWRWmQ5kUO4ylJMAR9BoF63dirRKYiL52UFZ82chU2jfX08i4KZwX-hQo8m_XOcSY3gZsRZ1xSPSo-mSWRyBciZitx2Uzuu2eFWUzvHiNXut2zW5DjqOvyFl60EHUBA3nt7sTH4SEdFXqyB4YrEfZDbn_cbmGX8g1wS919t82x6feCZHkGtulvQ_8fQJNTcWxB6iamSRMipj5mRP87Qvb14AcR39WDL7WtG9hozDo-PURIA1FMkiY7oIwV2h81b25VLXZ5EjH9NSNdNoDWh0pQi0jzKUf_yUyy4044oHHZ1jWObk7uPE0g05OI7my4LmpsRb0X_lmkZ4oaOWl7zv6GAnXu1E7CsQFcZakfYlvdnYy)**

name: Fight For Progress
subject: United. Committed. Focused
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
In contrast to Republicans, House Democrats demonstrated a clear commitment to getting the job done.

| Fight for Progress is dedicated to building a more progressive America and has raised over $200,000 for Democratic candidates. Team -- Like so many of us, Justice Sonia Sotomayor says she was shocked and saddened when the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe v. Wade._

**But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

body:
Friends, Jim Jordan does not belong in Congress. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tw-mncemail-default?refcode=221006_FR_whoiam-tw-RESEND2-ntl_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tw-mncemail-default?refcode=221006_FR_whoiam-tw-RESEND2-ntl_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Hi Friend,
Well, our headquarters is officially closed, but I am fired up and ready to go! I have regrouped and created THE winning strategy to beat Jim Jordan in 2024. I had a lot of challenges being brand new to politics and then having to go up against the worst guy in Congress... I mean, WOW, it was a lot, but I held my own. I sacrificed my life and my job for my campaign because democracy and our country are that important to me. Next time, I will have the army I need behind me to take out Jim Jordan.
Unfortunately, the bills are still rolling in. I'll be honest, in the end, I spent every penny I raised to put more ads on TV, and per the election results, it helped. Will you help me put 2022 in the past, so I can focus on building and nurturing community relationships for my 2024 run? Every penny counts. Will you pitch in $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or $2,900?

clean_body: Friends, Jim Jordan does not belong in Congress. [] [] [] Hi Friend, Well, our headquarters is officially closed, but I am fired up and ready to go! I have regrouped and created THE winning strategy to beat Jim Jordan in 2024. I had a lot of challenges being brand new to politics and then having to go up against the worst guy in Congress... I mean, WOW, it was a lot, but I held my own. I sacrificed my life and my job for my campaign because democracy and our country are that important to me. Next time, I will have the army I need behind me to take out Jim Jordan. Unfortunately, the bills are still rolling in. I'll be honest, in the end, I spent every penny I raised to put more ads on TV, and per the election results, it helped. Will you help me put 2022 in the past, so I can focus on building and nurturing community relationships for my 2024 run? Every penny counts. Will you pitch in $25, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or $2,900?
